chapters.text: Atil’a chu Thu um ahin, Thu chu Pathentoh uma ahi, chule Thu chu Pathen ahi.
Hichu atil’a Pathentoh uma ahi.
Amavanga thil jouse uma ahi; a um jouse hi ama louva um khatcha jong aumpoi.
Ama a chun hinna aumin, chule hinna chu mihem vah ahi.
Chuin vah chun muthim lah ahinsal’in, ahin muthim-in anahepoi.
Pathena kona hinkisol mi khat ahungin, ama chu a min John ahi.
Ama vanga mi jousen atahsan theina dinga vah thudol chu hettohsah dinga, hettohsah a ama chu hunga ahi.
Ama chu vah chu ahipon, vah thudol chu hettohsah dinga hungjoh ahibouve.
Van-noiya hunga mitin hung salvah chu vah tahbeh ahi.
Ama chu vannoiya ahung umin, chule vannoi hi ama sem ahi ahin vannoiyin ama anahepoi.
Ama ama-a te henga hunga ahin ama-a ten anasang pouve.
Ahivangin aman ana-sanga ama mina tahsan chan chu Pathen chate ahi theina dingu thu apetai;
chute ho chu thisan le tahsaphe lunglam le mihem lunglama kona peng hilouvin Pathen hin ahibouvui.
Chuin Thu chu tahsaphe ahung soh-in ilah-uva ahung chengin, keihon aloupina Pa a kona chapa chang khatseh loupi chu, lungset le thutah dim-set’in kamutauve.
John in ama thudol chu ahettohsah len, “Kanunga hunga chu keima sangin amasa jotai; ama keima masangpeh a um jingsa ahi,” tin asame.
Ajeh chu ama aletset’a kon chun eiho lungset chunga lungset ichang tauve.
Ajeh iham itile danthu chu Mose peh ahin; lungset le thutah chu Christa vanga hung umdoh ahi.
Koiman imatih chan in Pathen amukhapoi; Pa kom’a beh jing Pathen Chapa chang khat chun aphondoh ahitai.
John thu hettohsah hiche ahi, “Koi nahim?” tia dong dinga Jerusalem a kona Juda hon thempuho le danthu sunho ahenga asol’u chun, aman aseidoh jenge, aseilep poi;
aseidoh jengin, “Keima Christa kahipoi,” ati.
Chuin amahon adongun, “Koiba nahim? Elijah nahim?” atiule, aman, “Kahipoi,” ati. ‘Themgao chu nahim?” atiule, “Kahipoi,” ati.
Hijeh chun amahon ajah a, “Koi nahim? Eihin solte ho kadonbut theina dinguva koi kahi nakitim?” atiuve.
Aman, “Keima Isaiah themgao sei, ‘Pakai lampi sem jangun,’ tia gamthip’a khosama mi khat ogin chu kahi,” ati.
Amaho chu Pharisee ho hinsol ahiuve.
Chuin amahon adongun ajah a, “Christa nahilouva chule Elijah la nahilouva themgao chula nahiloule, ibol’a Baptize nachansah ji ham?” atiuve.
John in adonbut’in, ajah uva, “Keiman twi’ah Baptize kachansah ji ahin, nalah uva nanghon nahet louvu mi khat adinge,
ama chu ahi, kanunga hunga keima akengchot khao sut lham hoi jong kahipoi,” ati.
Hicheng chu Jordan gal’a Bethany a John Baptize chansahna a chu soh ahi.
Ajingin ahenga Jesu ahung amun, “Hichun veuvin, vannoi chonset pomang Pathen kelngoi nou khu!
Ama hi ahi, kanunga hunga keima sangin amasatai, tia kasei chu; ijeh-inem itile ama keima masangpeh a ana umsa ahi.
Keiman ama kanahepoi, ahivangin Israel lah a ama phondohna dinga twiya Baptize chansah a kahung ahi,” ati.
Chuin John in ahet-tohsah-in, “Keiman vakhu banga Lhagao chu van a kona ahung kumlhah a achunga achuh kamun, achungah aumdentai.
Chule keiman ama kanahepoi, ahivangin twiya Baptize chansah a eisol’a chun kajah a, ‘Nangman Lhagao ahung kuma achunga aum namu chu, ama chu Lhagao Thenga Baptize chansah ding ahi,’ eiti.
Chule keiman kamun, ama hi Pathen Chapa ahi, tia kahettohsah ahitai,” ati.
Chukitman ajingin John adingin, aseijuiho ni toh ahin,
Jesu ava le chu agah ven, “Veuvin, Pathen Kelngoi nou khu!” ati.
Chuin aseijuite ni chun athusei chu aja lhonin Jesu nung ajui lhontai.
Chuin Jesu akiheiyin amanin anung ajui lhon chu amun. “Ipi nahol lhon ham?” ati. Chuin amanin, “Rabbi, hichu houhil tina ahi, hoiya naum jim?” ati lhonin ahile,
aman, “Hung lhonin hung ve lhonta,” ati. Chuin ache lhonin aumna chu agamu lhonin, chuin hiche ni chun amatoh aum lhontai, hichu nidan som don ahi.
John thusei ja a anung juite ni khatjoh chu Simon Peter naopa Andrew ahi.
Ama chun amasapen in asopipa Simon chu amun ajah a, “Messiah kamutauve,” ati; hichu Christa tina ahi.
Hiti chun Jesu hengah ahinpuiyin ahi. Jesun ama chu aven,” John chapa Simon nahi, Cephas nakisah ding ahi,” ati. Hichu Peter tina ahi.
Chuin ajingin Jesun Galilee gam lama che agon ahile, Philip amun ajah a, “Neijuiyin,” ati.
Philip chu Bethsaida khoa mi ahin, Andrew le Peter chenna khoma ma chu ahi.
Philip chun Nathanael amun ajah a, “Athudol Mose’n danthu bua asut le themgao ho sut, ama chu kamutauve, Nazareth Jesu Joseph chapa chu,” ati.
Chuin Nathanael chun ajah a, “Nazareth khoa kona thilpha soh thei ngaiyem?” ati. Philip’in ajah-a, hungin lang hungvetan, ati.
Jesun Nathanael ahenga ahung amun, athudol aseiyin, “Veuvin Israel mitahbeh phat lhem na nei louhel khu,” ati.
Nathanael’in ajah a, “Hoiya kona iti neihet ham?” ati. Jesun adonbut’in ajah a, “Philip’in nakou masanga theichang phung noiya nauma chu kamu ahitai,” ati.
Chuin Nathanael’in adonbut’in, “Rabbi, nangma Pathen Chapa nahi; nangma Israelte lengpa nahi,” ati.
Jesun adonbut’in, “Keiman najah a, “Theichang phung noiya nauma kamu ahitai,’ tia asei jeh a chu natahsan ham? Hiche sanga chu chungnungjo namu ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin aman ajah a, “Tahbeh a kaseipeh nahi, Van akihona Pathen Vantil le ho Mihem Chapa chunga akal tou le akumsuh namu ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin ani thum nin Galilee gama Cana khoah moupui golvah aumin; chua chun Jesu nu aumin;
chule moupui golvahna a chu Jesu le aseijuiho jong akouvu ahi.
Chuin lengpitwi alhahsam phat’in Jesu anun ajah a, “Lengpitwi aneitapouve,” ati.
Chuin Jesun ajah a, “Numei eini i-ikin um am? Keima kaphat hijep loulai hi,” ati.
Anun lhacha ho jah a, “Najah uva asei chan bol’un,” ati.
Chukoma chu Judate dan a kisuh thengna mon ni mon thum ket cheh songbel gup uma ahin,
Jesun ajah uva, “Twibel ho chu twi sung dimun,” ati. Chuin amahon hicheng chu twi asung dimset tauve.
Chuin aman ajah uva, “Tun thal un lang golvah vaihompa henga choiyun,” ati. Chuin amahon achoi tauve.
Chuin golvah vaihompa chun twisih lengpitwi kisosah chu atep khah phat chun hoiya kon ahi ahepoi, lhacha ho athal’a pang ho vang chun ahenauve. Chuin golvah vaihompa chun mouchang chu akouvin ajah a,
“Mitinin lengpitwi achih atungdoh masa ngaiyin; chule min adon khop teng le adaojep apejin; nangman tu geiyin lengpitwi chih nakoi nalaiye,” ati.
Jesun hiche melchihna kidang chu Galilee gama Cana khoa abolpat ahin, aloupina aphongdoh tai. Chule aseijui hon atahsan tauve.
Chuin chuche jou chun Capernaum a agachesuh-in amatoh anutoh chule asopi ho le aseijuiho toh ahiuvin, chukoma chun ni sotpi aumpouve.
Chuin Juda ho kalchuh kut anaitan ahile Jesu Jerusalem a achetoutai.
Chuin aman houin sungah bong le kelngoi chule vapal joh ho chule sum lheng ho atouvu agatoh-in;
chuin aman khao akihol’in jepna asemin, abon chauvin kelngoi pum, bongchal pumin houin a konin anodoh in, sum lheng ho sum aboh lhah peh-in, adokhangu chu ale khuppeh-in;
chuin vapal joh ho jah a chun, “Hiti ho hi hia konin podoh-un; ka-Pa in chu sumkol veina inin bol hih-un,” ati.
Hichun, “Na-in a katom panin eine chaiye,” tia kisun chu aseijuihon ageldoh tauve.
Hijeh chun Juda Hon adonbut’un ajah a, “Thil hicheng nabol hi amelchihna ipi neimusah-um?” atiuve.
Chuin Jesun adonbut’in ajah uva, “Hiche houin hi suchimun, keiman ni thumin tungdoh inge,” ati.
Hijeh chun Juda hon, “Hiche houin sahna a kum som li le kum gup jen lut chu nangman nithuma natundoh ding ong?” atiuve.
Amanla ama tahsa houin aseina ahibouve.
Hijeh chun ama athi lah a kona kaithouva aum phat chun aseijuiten hiche asei chu ageldoh-un, Pathen lekhabua thu le Jesu thusei chu atahsan tauve.
Kalchuh kut laiya ama Jerusalem a aum pet chun athilbol melchihna ho chu amu’vin mi tamtah-in ama min’ah atahsan tauve.
Ahivangin Jesun amaho chu angampipoi; ajeh chu aman mi jouse ahetsoh ahin;
chule mi thudol min hetsah ding chu angaipoi; ijeh-inem itile mi lungsunga ipi aum aman ahet soh kei ahi.
Pharisee ho lah mi amin Nicodemus atiu Juda vaipo khat aumin,
ama chu jan in Jesu hengah ahungin ajah a, “Rabbi, Pathena kona hung houhil khat nahi, ti keihon kaheuve. Ajeh chu Pathen toh kivop louvan melchihna kidang nabol chengse hi koiman abol theipoi,” ati.
Jesun adonbut’in ajah a, “Tahbeh a kaseipeh nahi, koi hijongle chunga kona thahpen kit lou chu koiman Pathen gam amu theipoi,” ati.
Nicodemus chun ajah a, “Mi ateh teng le iti pen thah thei ding ham? Aniveina a anu oisunga lut’a peng kit theiyam?” ati.
Jesun adonbut’in, “Tahbeh a kaseipeh nahi, mi koi hijongle twiya le Lhagaova a pen loule Pathen gam alut theipoi.
Tahsaphea kona penga chu tahsaphe ahin, Lhagaova kona penga chu Lhagao ahi.
Chunga kona nathahpen kit dingu ahi, tia najah a kasei chu datmo hih-un.
Hui khu anun nomna lam lamah anungjin, nangman agin najanan hoiya hung kona hoilama acheji nahepoi. Lhagaova peng ho chengse jong chuti chu ahiuve,” ati.
Nicodemus chun adonbut’in ajah a, “Hicheng chu iti hi thei ding ham?” ati.
Jesun adonbut’in ajah a, “Nang la Judate houhil nahin hiti ho chu nahet lou ham?
Keiman tahbeh a kaseipeh nahi, keihon kahet kaseiyuva kamu kahetsah-u ahi, ahivangin kahettohsah-u hi nang hon nasangpouve.
Keiman nangho jah a leiset thu kaseiya nanghon natahsan louvule van thuho sei leng iti natahsan dingu ham?
Koima vana akal khapoi, van a kona hung kumlha Mihem Chapa tailou chu.
Chule gamthip’a Mose’n gul adop sang bang banga chu,
koi hile atahsan chanin ama a tonsot hin kemlou anei theina dinga Mihem Chapa hi kidom sang ding ahi.
Ajeh chu Pathenin hibanga hi vannoi angailut ahin. koi hijongle ama tahsan chan chu mangthah louva tonsot hin kemlou anei theina dingin. Achapa chang khat chu apetan ahi.
Ajeh chu Pathenin Chapa chu vannoi themmo chansah dinga hilouvin vannoi mite ama vanga huhhinga a um theina dinguva vannoiya ahinsol joh ahibouve.
Ama tahsana chu themmo chang louva ahitai. Atahsan lou vang chu themo changa um ahitai, aman Pathen Chapa chang khat min a atahsan loujeh chun.
Chule themmo achan nau chu hiche ahi, vannoiyah vah ahungin ahivangin a chon nau phatlou jeh in mihon vah sangin muthim adeijouvin ahi.
Ijeh inem itile achon phalou jousen vah ahoi, achon phatlou chu kisosal khante atin vah a chun ahungjong ahungjipoi.
Thutah bola vang chu athilpha bol chu Pathen vanga ahi ti aphondoh nan vah a ahung jin ahi.” ati.
Chucheng nung chun Jesu aseijuite toh Judea gamah ahungun chuin chukoma chun amahotoh aumin baptize achansah jin ahi.
Chule John in jong Salim kenga Aenon khoa chun twi atam jeh chun baptize achansah-in, miho chu ahungun baptize ahung chang jiuvin ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile hichun John songkul’a akhum hih laiyuve.
Hia chun John seijuiho le Juda mi khat kisuh thengthudol’in akinel tauvin ahi.
Chuin amaho John henga ahungun ajah a, “Rabbi, ven Jordan gal’a naumpi athu nahettohsah, ama chun baptize achansah jin mi jouse ahenga ahung jiuve,” atiuve.
John in adonbut’in, “Mi van a kona kipelou chu ima achang theipoi.
Nang ho tah keima thu hettohsah nahiuve, keiman keima Christa kahipoi, ama masanga hinkisol kahibouve, kati chu.
Mou kichenpia chu mouchang ahi; mouchang jol akoma dinga athusei ja a chu ama gin a chu hapa kipahji ahi; hijeh a chu keima kipana chu kibulhit ahitai.
Ama chu khangtou tou ding ahin, keima kemsuh suh ding kahi.
Chunga kona hunga chu mi jouse chunga chung nungpen ahi. Leiya kona chu leiya mi ahin, leiset thubou asei ahi; vana kona hunga chu chungnungpen ahi.
Aman amu chan le ajah chan ahettohsah ahin; ahettohsah chu koiman asangpoi.
Athu hettohsah sanga chun Pathen chu dihtah ahi, tia amin mohor anam ahitai.
Ijeh-inem-itile Pathen sol chun Pathen thuho aseiyin; atepten Lhagao apepoi.
Pa chun Chapa chu angailun thil jouse akhut’a apetai.
Chapa tahsana chun tonsot hin kemlou anei ahitai; Chapa thu ngailou vang chun hinna mu lou ding. Pathen lunghan achunga umjo ding bou ahi,” ati.
Chuin Pakai chun John sangin Jesun seijui tamjo asemin baptize achan tamsah joi, ti Pharisee hon ajatauve, ti ahet phat’in;
Jesun aman baptize achansah louva aseijuiho abolsah ahi jeng vangin.
Judea gam adalhan Galilee gam lama akiletan ahi.
Chule Samaria gam ajot tei ding ahi.
Chuti chun Samaria kho khat Sychar atiuva chun ahung lhung tan, hichu Jacob’in achapa Joseph apeh mun kom chu ahi.
Chukoma chu Jacob twikul uma ahi. Jesu alamjot thachol’in twikul panga chun atouvin, hichu nidan gup don ahi.
Chukoma chun Samaria numei khat twi thal’in ahungin ahile Jesun amanujah a chun ‘Twi don ding neipen,” ati.
Ijeh-inem itile aseijuite chu neh ding choa khopi sunga lut anahitauve.

Hiti chu ahijeh chun Samaria numeinu chun ajah a, “Nangma la Juda mi nahin, Samaria numei keima henga twi donding nathum chu iti dan ham?” ati. Ijeh-inem itile Juda mi le Samaria mi ima kimangto lou ahi.

Jesun adonbut’in amanu jah a, “Pathen thilpeh hen lang chule ‘Twi don ding neipen,’ tia nahenga thuma chu koi ahi kihetle chunla nangman ama henga nathumjoh ding ahin, chutile aman nangma hinna twi peta dinga,” ati.
Numeinu chun ajah a, “Pu, nangman athalna ding imala naneipon, twikulla athuh-in, hin twi chu hoiya nalah ham?
Twikul hi eipeuva aman jong don a achateu aganchaho donsah a kapau Jacob sanga chungnungjo nahim?” ati.
Jesun adonbut’in amanujah a, “Koi hijong le hiche twi don chengse chu dangchah kit ding ahi.
Koi hijongle keiman kapeh ding twi vang chu adon jouse dangchah kitta lou ding ahi; chule keiman kapeh ding twi chu asunga tonsot kemlou hintwi putna twinah sohdoh ding ahi,” ati.
Numeinu chun ajah a, “Pu, hiche twi chu neipen, kadangchah kit louna ding le hikoma gam hichan a hi twi thal’a kahungji louna dingin,” ati.
Jesun ajah a, “Chen na-inneipu gakouvin, hikoma hung lhonin,” ati.
Numeinu chun adonbut’in ajah a, “Keiman inneipu kaneipoi,” ati. Jesun amanu jah a, “Inneipu kaneipoi,” nati chu nasei dih lheh-e;
ijeh-inem itile nangman ji nga nanei ahitai, tua nanei khu nangma ji ahipoi; hiche nasei chu adih lheh-e,” ati.
Numeinu chun ajah a, “Pu nangma hi themgao nahi, ti kahedoh tai.
Kapute kapateuvin hiche mol’a hi Pathen ahoujiu ahi; ahin nanghon, ‘Min Pathen ahouna ding munchu Jerusalem ahi,’ natiuve,” ati.
Jesun amanu jah a, “Numei, neitahsan in, nanghon Pa chu nahouna dingu hiche mol’a jong hilou Jerusalem a jong hilou, hitobang phat chu ahung lhunge.
Nanghon nahet louhel’u nahouvu ahin, keihon kahet kahouvu ahi; ijeh-inem itile huhhingna chu Judate lah a konbou ahi.
Ahivangin phat ahung lhunge, tu hi ahi, chutengle ahou tahbeh hon Pa chu lhagao le thutah a ahou dingu ahi; ijeh-inem itile Pa chun chutobangho bou chu ahou dinga ahol ahi.
Pathen chu Lhagao ahi, chule ahouten Lhagao le Thutah a ahou ding mong ahi,” ati.
Numeinu chun ajah a, “Keiman Messiah Christa atiu chu ahung ding ahi, ti kahei. Ama chu ahung tengle aman ijakai eihil soh kei dingu ahinai,” ati.
Jesun amanu jah a, “Nakihoupi keima hi ama chu kahi,” ati.
Chuin hiche pettah chun aseijuite ahungun, numeinu toh anakihou chu adatmo lheh jengui, ahivangin la, “Ipi thum a nahim?” Ahiloule, Amanu chuto ibola kihou nahim? tia khatcha jong aumpouve.
Chuti chun numeinu chun atwibel adalhan khopi sunga chun achen miho jah a chun,
“Hungun, mi khat hung veuvin, kathilbol kachonna jouse eiseidohpeh soh keiye; hiche hi Christa hikhat ding ham?” ati.
Amaho khopia kon chun apotdoh-un ama henga ahungui.
Hichepet chun aseijuite ahenga ataovun, “Rabbi, an nen,” atiuve.
Ahivangin aman ajah uva, “Nangho het lou an neh ding kaneiye,” ati.
Hijeh chun aseijuite khat le khat akihouvun, “Khatouvin neh ding an ahin choipeh ham?” akitiuve.
Jesun amaho jah a, “Eisolpa lung got lam bol le akin suh bulhit keima an ahi.
Nanghon ‘Chang atna ding lha li a um nalaiye,’ natiji hih-um? Veuvin, keiman nangho jah-a kasei ahi, Khodauvin lou jao khu gah veuvin, tun a-at phat ahi, aminin agusoh tai.
A-at chun athaman asangjin, chule aga chu tonsot hin kemlouvah akholjin ahi; chuti chun atupa le a-atpa thakhat pan akipah thanom khomji lhone.
Chuti chu ahin hichea hin, ‘Khat’in atun achom khat’in a-atji,’ ti thu hi tahbeh ahi.
Natoh gim lou nau at’a kasol nahiuve, michom dangin atohgim ahin, nangho amaho tohsa a lut nahiuve,” ati.
Chuin, “Kathilbol kachonna chengse eiseidoh peh-e,” tia hettohsah numeinu thusei jal chun chuche khopia Samaria mi tamtah-in atahsan tauve.
Hijeh chun Samaria miho chu ama henga ahungun, amaho chu aumpina dingun angeh tauvin ahile, ama chukoma ni ni anichongin ahi.
Ama thusei jal’in jong mi tamtah in atahsanbe tauvin, numeinu jah a chun,
“Tun nangma thusei jal’a katansan u ahipoi; ijeh-inem itile keihotah-in kajauvin, ama hi vannoi huhhingtah mong ahi, ti chu kahetauve,” atiuve.
Chuche ni nijou chun ama chukoma kon chun Galilee lama achetai.
Ijeh inem itile ama gamsunga themgao aja umpoi, ti Jesu amatah-in ahettoh sahsa ahi.
Hijeh chun Galilee alhun phat’in Galilee mihon ana sangui; ajeh chu Jerusalem a kut laiya athilbol imaho chu amahon aboncha amu soh keiyu ahi; amaho jong kut’a chu chea ahiuve.
Galilee gama twisih lengpitwi asosahna Cana khoa chun ache kit tan ahi. Chuin hikoma chun milal khat aumin achapa na a Capernaum a um ahin;
chuin ama chun Jesu Judea gama konin Galilee gamah ahung tai, ti ajah phat’in ahenga achen, achesuh a chapa chu agabol dam dingin angeh tan ahi; ajeh chu a ma chu athikoncha ahitai.
Hijeh chun Jesun ajah a, “Melchihna le thil kidang namu lousen tahsanpon nate,” ati.
Milalpa chun ajah a, “Pu, kachapa chu athi kahin hungsuh-in,” ati.
Jesun ajah a, “Nache na dinga kichetan, nachapa ahinge,” ati. Mipa chun ajah a Jesu thuseiho atahsanin achetai.
Chuin achesuh in ahile asoh hon ahung lamtouvin achapa chu adamtai, ahung tiuve.
Chuti chun aman, “Itih a dam pan hitam?” tin adongiil ahile, amahon, “Jan hin nidan sagin akhosih-in alhatai,” atiuve.
Hijeh chun apa chun hichu Jesu ajah a, “Nachapa ahinge,” tia asei nidantah ahi chu ahitan; chuin amatah-in a-insung mi chengse toh atahsan tan ahi.
Hiche hi Jesun Judea gam adalhah a Galilee gama ahunga melchihna abol kit anina ahi.
Hicheng nung chun Juda miho kut khat aumin, chule Jesu Jerusalem a aga chetouvin ahi.
Hia chun kelngoi kot phunga twikul khat uma ahin, amin chu Hebrew paova, ‘Bethsaida’ kisah ahin aleibuh nga ahi.

Hia chun mi khat kum som thum le kum get jen chatmoa ahin;
Jesun ama chu analup amun kum sottah na a ahi chu ahen ajah a, “Nadam nom em?” ati.
Anapa chun adonbut’in, “Pu, twi ahung kicholoh teng le twikul’a eikoi lha ding mi koimala kaneipon; kachele kalhun kah le mi dangin eikhel’in achejitai,” ati.
Jesun ajah a, “Kipatdoh-in nalupna kichoiyin lam jottan,” ati.
Chuin mipa chu adam paihel jengtan, alupna akichoiyin lam ajottan ahi. Hiche ni chu cholngah ni ahi.
Hichejeh chun Juda hon mi akiboldampa jah a chun, “Cholngah ni ahi, nangman nalupna nakichoi chu dan ngai ahipoi,” atiuve.
Ahin aman amaho chu adonbut’in, “Eiboldampa tah-in kajah a, ‘Nalupna kichoiyin lam jottan,’ eiti chu,” ati.
Amahon adongun, “Najah a, ‘Nalupna kichoiyin lam jottan,’ tia chu koi ham?’
Akiboldampa chunla chukoma mipi tamtah jeh chun Jesu la guhthima anavah manga ahitan, aboldama chu koi ahi ahepon ahi.
Khonungin Jesun amachu houin’ah amun ajah a, “Ven, akiboldama nahitai, chonse kit ta hih-in, ajo le akhohjo cheh nachunga chu get’in te,” ati.
Mipa chu achemangin, “Aboldampa Jesu ahi,” tin Juda ho jah a agaseitan ahi.
Chuin hiche jeh chun Juda hon Jesu abolsetauve, cholngah nia chucheng abol jeh chun.
Ahivangin Jesun amaho chu adonbut’in, “Kapan tu gei hin na atongin, keiman jong katonge,” ati.
Hichejeh chun Juda hon ama thana ding chu ahabol cheh tauve. Ajeh chu aman cholngah ni apal lhah keo hilouvin, Pathen apa ahisah a Pathentoh kibanga akisei jeh jong chu ahi.

Hijeh chun Jesun adonbut’in ajah uva, “Tahbeh beh a kaseipeh nahiuve. Chapa chun ama chamin ima abol theipoi, a-Pan abol amu cha chabou chu ahi; ijeh-inem itile aman abolchan chu atobang banga Chapan jong abol ahi.
ijeh inem itile Pa chun Chapa chu angailun athilbol jouse chu avetsahji ahi; kidang nasahna dinguva aman hiche ho sanga hi chungnungjo thil avetsah ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile Pan mithiho akaithouva ahinsah banga Chapan jong ahinsah nom nom ahinsah ahi.
Pa chun mi koima thu atanpoi, thutan ding jouse Chapa apehdoh ahitai;
mi jousen Pa ajabol banga Chapa chu ajabol theina dingin Chapa jabol lou chun ahinsola Pa chu ajabol lou ahi.
Tahbeh beh a kaseipeh nahiuve, kathusei ngaiya chule eisolpa tahsan chun tonsot hinna anei ahitai, chule thupi tanna geita louva, thina a kona hinna galkaiya ahitai.
Tahbeh beh a kaseipeh nahiuve, ‘Phat ahung lhunge, tu hi ahi, mithihon Pathen Chapa o ajah dingu; chule aja ho chengse chu hing ding ahiuve.
Ijeh-inem itile Pan amatah a hinna anei banga chu Chapan jong amatah a hinna anei ahi;
chule Mihem Chapa ahijeh a chu thutan chaina thuneina apeh ahitai.
Hiche hi datmo hih-un; ijeh-inem itile phat ahung lhunge, hichea chu lhan khuh a um ho jousen o ajah dingu, chule hungdoh ding ahiuve;
thilpha bolte ho chengse hinna a thoudoh kit ding, chule thilphalou bolte ho chengse themmo changa thoudoh ding ahiuve.
Keiman kachamin ima kabol theipoi, Kajah bang banga thu katan ahin, kathutan chu dihtah ahi, keima lung got lam suh bulhit ding go louva eisolpa lung got lam suh bulhit kagot jeh hin.
Keiman keima thu kahettohsah hile kathu hettohsah chu dih lou ahi.
Kathu hettohsah a chu michom dang ahin, chule aman kathu ahettohsah chu dihtah ahi ti kahei.
Nanghon John henga mi nasolun ahile aman thutah chu ahettohsah-e.
Keima hettohsah vang hi mihema kona kalah ahipoi; hijongle nangho huhhinga naumna dinguva hiche hi kasei ahi.
Ama chu thaomei konga salvah a tobang ahin; chule nanghon ama vah a chu chomcha khat nomsah nanom un ahi.
Ahinla hettohsahna keiman kanei hi John a sanga chu chungnungjo ahi; ijeh-inem itile Pan bolchai dinga eipeh kathibol chengse tah hin Pan eisol kahi chu ahettohsah ahi.
Chule Pa eisolpatah chun keima thudol ahettohsah tai. Nanghon imatih-in ama o najakha pouve, amel jong namukha pouve;
chule athujong nasunguva achengpoi, ijeh-inem itile nanghon asol chu natahsan pouve.
Nanghon Pathen lekhabua thu naholtoh jiuve, asunga chu tonsot hinna naneiyuva nanga ito jeh-un; ahin hiche ho chu keima thudol hettohsah ahiuve;
ahin hinna nanei theina dingun kahenga nahung nompouve.
Keiman mihem choiat kasangpoi
Ahivangin keiman nangho kahenauve, nangho sung’ah Pathen ngailutna naneipouve.
Keima ka-Pa min a hunga kahin, nanghon neisang pouve; achom dang khat ama minin hung le ama chu anasang nauvin nate.
Pathen khatseh a hung kon choiat chu hol louva nangho khat’in khat choiat kisangtouva chu, iti natahsan thei dingu ham?
Keiman nangho Pa henga kaheh dingin ngaito hih-un; naheh jiuva mi khat, Mose, nanghon nakineppiu chu aum e.
Nanghon Mose chu tahsan leu chun keima neitahsan dingu ahi; ajeh chu aman keima thudol asut ahi.
Ama sut natahsan lou vangu le kathu iti natahsan dingu ham?” ati.
Hicheng jou chun Galilee dil len, Tiberias dillen kiti, gal lang khat lama chun achemangtai.
Chuin mipi atama tamin amaho chunga athilbol melchihna ho amu jeh-u chun anung ajuiyui.
Chuin Jesu mol chunga akaltouvin aseijuiho toh atou tauvin ahi.
Hichun Juda ho kalchuh kut kivah naiya ahitan;
hijeh chun Jesu adahdoh in ahile mipi atama tam ahenga ahung amun, Philip jah a, “Hite ho neh ding hi changlhah hoiya ichoh dingu ham?” ati.
Hichu aman apatepna ati ahibouve; ijeh-inem itile abol ding chu aman akihetnan ahi.
Philip’in adonbut’in, “Themcha khat chenga chang ding hijeng jongleu changlhah Denaria ja ni manin toh ponte,” ati.
Aseijuite lah a khat Simon Peter sopipa Andrew chun ajah a,
hikoma chapang khat aumin ama hin sap changa kisem changlhah pheng nga le nga ni aneiye; ahinla mi hijatpi lah a hichu ikham hi ding ham?” ati.
Jesun, “Miho chu tousah-un,” ati. Hikoma chu hamhing tamtah um ahin, chuin mi sang nga jen chu atoutauve.
Chuin Jesun changlhah alan Pathen alhaiyin, atouho chu ahoppeh-in; chule agochana nga jong chu apei.
Chuin amaho avasoh phat’un aman aseijuite jah a, “Hiti ho chu amangthah um louhel’in amoh anong chengse chu loh khom un,” ati.
Chuin amahon aloh khomun ahile, sap changa kisem changlhah pheng nga a kon chun aneh moh nongu paipeh som le paipeh ni aloh dimui.
Hijeh chun aman chuche melchihna kidang avetsah chu amu’vin miho chu akihouvun, “Themgao vannoiya hung dinga chu ama mong mong hi ahi,” atiuve.
Hijeh chun ama chu leng chansah dingin acham louva mat agouvin hung akigouve, ti Jesun ahen achangin mol chunga akaltou kit tan ahi.
Chuin nilhah ahi phat’in aseijuite dil’a chun achesuh-un,
chuin konga alut’un Capernaum lam panga galkai dingin akitoltauve. Hichun khola athimtan, ahivangin Jesu ahenguvah ahung hih laiyin ahi.
Huipi nasatah anun jeh-in twi akinong sang tul tul jengin ahi.
Ching som ni le ching nga ahim, ching somthum ahim ajap lhungun, Jesun twi chunga lam ajot’a kong lam ahinjot amu’vin ahile akichatauve.
Ahin aman amaho jah a, “Keima kahibouve, kicha hih-un,” ati.
Hichun amahon konga lah lut ding anom tauvin, chule hiche pettah chun kong chu ajot nau mun alhungpai tan ahi.

Ajingin dil len gal lang khat lama mipi ding ho chun, chukoma chu aseijuite chonna tailou chu kong dang aumpon, chule Jesu chula aseijuite toh chuche konga alutpon, aseijuite amaho chang bou ahiuvin, ti chu aheuvin;
ahivangin Tiberias a kona kong dang dang hunga Pakaiyin Pathen alhaiya mihon changlhah aneh nau mun koma chu lhunga uma ahi;
chuti chun mipi ho chun Jesu le aseijuite aum tapouve, ti aheuvin, amaho chu konga akal’un Jesu hol’in Capernaum a ahung tauve.
Chuin amahon dil len gal lang khat panga ama amu’vin, “Rabbi, itih a hilam nalhun ham?” atiuvin ahile,
Jesun amaho chu adonbut’in, “Keiman nangho tahbeh a kaseipeh nahiuve, melchihna kidang namu jeh-u hilouvin changlhah nanehva jeh-uva bou keima neihol’u ahi.
Amangthahji an holnan thohgim hih-un, tonsot hin kemlouva um jing an holnan thohgim jouvin. Hiche an chu Mihem Chapan napeh dingu ahi; ajeh chu Pa Pathen in ama chu mohor anamdet ahitai,” ati.
Hichun amahon ajah a, “Pathen lunglam na katoh theina dinguva ipi kabol dingu ham?” atiuve.
Jesun adonbut’in ajah uvah, “Ahinsol hi tahsan leu chun hichu Pathen natoh ahi,” ati.
Hijeh chun amahon ajah a, “Kamu’va katahsan theina dinguva melchihna ipi nabol’em? Itobang na natoh nganem?
Kapute kapateuvin gamthip’ah manna aneuvin ahi; ‘Aman vana konin aneh dingu changlhah apei,’ tia kisun bang chun,” atiuve.
Hichun Jesun ajah uva, “Tahbeh beh a kasepeh nahiuve, vana kona changlhah napeuva chu Mose ahipoi; van a kona changlhah tahbeh chu ka-Panbou napeuve.
Ijeh-inem itile Pathen changlhah chu vana kona hung kumlha vannoi hinna pea chu ahi,” ati.
Hiche chun amahon ajah a, “Pakai hiche changlhah chu aimatih chanin neipeuvin,” atiuve,
Jesun ajah uva, “Keima hi hinna changlhah kahi; kahenga hunga chu gilkellou ding, chule keima eitahsana chu dangchahta louhel ding ahi.
Ahivanginla kaseipeh nahiuve, nanghon keima neimu vangun neitahsan hih laiyui.
Ka-Pan keima eipeh chengse chu kahenga hung ding; chule kahenga hunga chu itijong le kaledoh lou ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile keima van a kona kahung kumlhah hi, keima lung got bol dinga hilouvin eisolpa lung got bol dingjoh a hung kahibouve.
Eisolpa lung got chu hiche ahi, aman eipeh chengse hi mansah nei louhel’a ni nunung ni leh aboncha kakaithou ding,
ijeh-inem itile Chapa chu mua tahsan chan chun hin kemlou anei ahi; chule ni nunung ni leh keiman ama chu kakaithou ding ahi, hichu kaPa lung got lam ahi.” ati.
Aman “Vana kona hung kumlha changlhah chu keima kahi,” atijeh chun Juda ho achungah aphun un.
“Joseph chapa Jesu, anu apa eihon ihet’u chu ama hi hi lou ham? Achutile, ‘Van a kona hung kumlha kahi,’ ati hi iti ati ham?” atiuve.
Jesun adonbut’in ajah uva, “Nangho khat le khat kihouvin phun hih-un.
Eisola ka-Pan aloilut loule koima kahenga ahung theipoi; chule ni nunung ni leh keiman ama chu kakaithou ding ahi.
’Amaho chu Pathen hil’a hicheh ding ahiuve.’ tin themgaoho lekhabua akisune. Pa a kona ja a kihilna neicha cha chu kahenga hungji ahiuve.
Pathen koma kona hung potdoh pa tailou chu koiman Pa chu amukhapoi; amabou chun Pa chu amu ahi.
Tahbeh beh a kaseipeh nahiuve, koi hijongle atahsana chun tonsot hin kemlou anei ahitai.
Keima hi hinna changlhah kahi.
Napute napateuvin gamthip’ah manna aneh vangun athi gamtauve.
Hiche hi min aneh a athi louna dinga van a hung kon changlhah ahi.
Keima hi van a hung kon changlhah hing chu kahi; koi hijongle hiche changlhah nea chu tonsot geiya hing jing ding ahi; chule vannoi hinna dinga kapeh ding changlhah chu kasa ahi,” ati.
Hichun Juda ho amaho le amaho akinel’un, “Hichepa hin ineh dinguva asa iti eipeh thei dingu ham?” atitauve.
Hijeh chun Jesun ajah uva, ‘Tahbeh beh a kaseipeh nahiuve, nanghon Mihem Chapa sa naneh louva athi nadon louvu le nangma ho sunga hinna neilou nahiuve.
Kasa nea kathi dona chun tonsot hinna anei ahitai. Chule ni nunung ni leh keiman ama chu kakaithou ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile kasa hi anneh tahbeh ahin, kathi hi don ding tahbeh ahi.
Kasa nea kathi dona chu keiyah aum jing jin, keima ama’ah kaum jingjie.
Pa hing chun eisola, Pa vanga kahin banga hi, koi hijongle keima einea chu ama jong chu keima vanga hing ding ahi.
Van a kona hung kumlha changlhah chu hiche hi ahi; pute paten aneh vanguva athiu chutobang chu ahipoi; hiche changlhah anea chu imatih chan a hing jing ding ahi,” ati.
Capernaum a thu ahil pet’a hicheng chu kikhopna in a asei ahi.
Hiche chun aseijuiho lah a tamtah in hiche thu chu ajauvin, “Ahahsa behseh jenge; kon angai thei ding ham?” atiuve.
Ahinla Jesun chuche thua aseijuite phun chu alung sungin ahen ajah uvah, “Hiche chun nakipal lhuhsah u hitam?
Achutile Mihem Chapa hi masanga aumna ngaiya akaltou muleu chun i-nati dingu ham?
Hinna pea Lhagao bou ahi, tahsaphen imachapa aphat chomsah poi; najah uva kathusei chengse hi Lhagao ahin, chule hinna ahi.
Ahivangin nalah uva abang bang atahsan lou naumui,” ati. Ajeh chu Jesun atil’a pat atahsan lou koi koi ahi chule ama matsah dinga chu koi ahi, anahet jingsa ahi.
Chuin aman, “Hiche jeh a chu najah uva, ‘Pa peh louvin koima kahenga ahung theipoi,’ kati ahi,” ati.
Hichea pat chun aseijuiho tamtah akinung leuvin amatoh achele ahungle tapouve.
Hichejeh chun Jesun som le ni ho jah a, “Nangho jong nache nomum,” a tile;
Simon Peter in adonbut’in, “Pakai, keiho koi henga kache dingu ham? Tonsot hin kemlouna thu nanga bou hichu.
Chule nangma Pathena Atheng nahi chu keihon katahsan un chule kaheuve,” ati.
Jesun amaho adonbut’in, “Keiman nangho som le ni kalhendoh-u hilou ham? Ahin la nangho lah a jong diabol khat aume,” ati.
Simon chapa Judas Iscariot chung chang thudol’a hichu asei ahi, ijeh-inem itile som le ni lah a amelma ho khut’a matsah dinga amatah chu ahi.
Chuin hicheng jou chun Juda hon tha dingin agouvin ahile, Jesun Judea gama va le anomta hih-in, Galilee gama avah le tai.
Hichepet chun Juda ho lhambuh kut anaitan ahile,
asopihon ajah a, “Nathil bol chengse hi naseijui hon jong amuna dingun hikom mun dalhan lang Judea gama chen.
Ijeh-inem itile minthan go-an koiman guhthim in thil abol ngaipoi. Thil hicheng hi nabol ahile vannoi kimusah-in,” atiuve.
Ijeh ham itile asopi ho jengin jong ama atahsan louvu ahi.
ijeh chun Jesun ajah uva, “Keima tun kaphat alhing hih laiye, nangho phat vang alhing jinge.
Vannoiyin nangho naho theipouve, keibou eihouve; ijeh ham itile athilbol’u aphapoi, tia keiman amaho thudol kahet tohsahjin ahi.
Hiche kut’a chun nangho cheuvin, keima vang tun hiche kut’a cheponge, kei kaphat alhing hih laiye,” ati.
Amaho jah a chun thu hicheng chu aseiyin ama Galilee a aumtan ahi.
Ahivangin asopite hi kut’a dinga ache nungun ama jong lhang phonga hilouvin, guhthimin achen ahi.
Hiche chun Juda hon kut’a chun ama chu ahol’un, “Hoiya um ham?” atiuve.
Chuin mipi lah a miho chu ama thudol’a aphun melmul jengui; abangin, “Ama chu mipha ahi,” atiuvin; abangin, “Ahipoi, mipi lam hilouva apuimang bouve,” atiuvin;
ahivangin Juda ho ginin ama thudol chu phonga seiya koima aumpouve.
Ahivangin kut kimtah ahi phat’in Jesu houin a achetouvin thu agahil’e.
Hijeh chun Juda hon adatmo lheh jengun, “Hichepan kihilna neikha louva lekha iti ahet hi-nga na?” atiuve.
Hiche chun Jesun amaho chu adonbut’in, “Kathuhil hi kei thu ahipoi, eisolpa a ahibouve.
Koi hijongle ama lung got lam bol noman kathuhil hi Pathena kon ahi, keima chama kasei ahi, ahet ding ahi.
Ama chama thuseiya chun ama kichoiat ding agot ahin, asolpa choiat ding goa vang chu, ama chu dihtah ahi, ama a chun chondih louna aumpoi.
Mose’n nangho chonna dan napeh louvu ham? Nangho khat chan jong chonna dan bang chun nachon pouve. Ibol’a tha dinga eigot a nahiu vem?” ati.
Chuin mipi chun adonbut’in, “Nangma thi lha vop nahi, koi ham tha dinga nagoa?” atiuve’
Jesun adonbut’in, ajah uva, “Keiman thil khat kabol’in ahile nabon chauvin hichu kidang nasauve.
Hichejeh a chu Mose’n cheptan thu napeh-u ahin, Mose chang peh hilouvin puluiho joh phudoh sapeh ahi; chule nanghon cholngah nin mi chep natan jiuve.
Mose thupeh suhkeh louna ding cholngah nia mi khat chep akitan le, cholngah ni mi khat kadamsah hel jeh a kachunga nalunghan u ham?
Alimsoa ngaito louvin dihtah-in ngaitouvin,” ati.
Hichun Jerusalem a mi kimkhat’in, “Tha dinga agot pau chu ama hi hilou ham?
Chule veuvin phongtah-in thu aseiyin, amahonla ajah a ima aseipouve. Vaipohon ama hi Christa ahi ti ahet tahbeh mongu hita ham?
Ahinla ama hi hoiya hung ahi, keihon kaheuve, Christa vang chu akonna koima ahea um lou ding ahi,” atiuve.
Hijeh chun Jesun houin a ahil’in, “Nanghon keima jong neiheuvin, chule hoiya hung kon kahi jong naheuve; ahin keima kachama hunga kahipoi, ahinla eisolpa chu dihtah ahi, ama chu nanghon nahepouve.
Keiman ama chu kahei; ijeh-inem itile ama a kon kahi, chule ama sol kahi,” tin asamtan ahi.
Hiche chun amahon mat dingin agouvin, ahin aphat alhin loulai jeh chun koiman achungah khut alhapon ahi.
Ahivangin mipi lah a mi tamtah-in ama chu atahsan tauvin ahi; chule Christa chu ahung tengle hichepan abol melchihna ho sanga tamjo abolnah ding ham?” atiuve.
Mipin chutia ama thudol’a chuche aseiyuva aphun melmul’u chu Pharisee hon ajauvin; chuin thempu pipuiho le Pharisee hon ama man ding chu sottol asol’ui.
Hijeh chun Jesun, “Chom cha khat nalah uva umtadi nalai ding kahi, chule eihinsolpa henga kache ding ahi.
Nanghon neihol’un natin neimu lou dingu, chule kaumna dinga jong chu nahung thei lou dingu ahi,” ati.
Hichun Juda hon khat le khat akidongun, “Eihon ama ihol’uva imu lou dingu chu ama hoiyabep che ding hinte? Ole Greek mi lah a cheng cheh ho henga chea Greek miho agahil ding khat tou ham?
’Nanghon neihol’un natin neimu lou dingu kaumna dinga jong nahung thei lou dingu ahi,’ ati hi ipi aseina ahidem?” atiuve.
Chuin kut kichai nin, hichu nipi ni ahin, Jesu adingin hatah-in asamin, “Koi hijongle adangchah a chu kahenga hung hen, hung don hen.
Keima eitahsana chu Pathen lekhabun asei bang banga asunga kona twihing putdoh a luiya long ding ahi,” ati.
Hichu ama tahsan hon Lhagao anei dingu chu aseina ahi; ijeh inem itile Jesu choiat’a aum loulai jeh a hiche geiya chu Lhagao kipe loulai ahi.
Thu hicheng chu ajauvin mipi lah a abang bangin, “Tahbeh-in ama hi themgao mong mong chu ahi,” atiuvin;
akim khat’in, “Ama hi Christa ahi,” atiuve. Akim khat vang chun “Christa Galileea kona sohdoh ngaiyem?
Christa chu David son hiding David chenna Bethlehem khopia sohdoh ding ahi,’ tia Pathen lekhabun asei hilou ham?” atiuve.
Chuti chun ama thudol’a chun mipi chu abung bungin akikhen tauve.
Chule abang ho chun ama chu mat ding agouvin; ahivangin koiman achungah khut alhapouve.
Chuin sottol mi man ho chu thempu pipuiho le Pharisee ho henga ahungun ahile amahon anadong un, “Ibol’a nahinpui dau ham?” atiuve.
Chuin sottol mi man ho chun adonbut’un, “Khuchepa thusei tobang khun mi koiman thu aseikhapoi,” atiuve.
Chuin Pharisee hon adonbut’un, ajah uva, “Nang ho jong duha lha a nahiu hitam?
Vaipo ho le Pharisee ho lah a khatbeh-in ama chu atahsan em?
Ahin danthu helou mipiho hi sapset changjia ahi,” atiuve.
Amaho lah a mi khat masanga ahenga gachea Nicodemus chun ajah uve,
“Mi athu ja masa lou le athilbol helouva themmosah idan ngaiyu ham?” ati.
Chuin amahon adonbut’un ajah a, “Nangjong Galilee mi nahim? Hol’in vetang, Galileea kona themgao sohdoh lou chu?” atiuve.
Hichun amaho a-in chengah achemang un ahi.
Jesu vang chu Olive lhang lama achetan ahi.
Chuin jingpitah-in houin a ahung kit tan ahile miho jouse ahenga ahungun, chuin ama atouvin amaho chu thu ahilpanin;
hichun danthu sun ho le Pharisee hon ajon pettah a kimandoh numei khat ahin kaiyun, alailungah adin-sah-un,
Jesu jah a, “Houhil, hiche numei-nu hi ajon pettah a kimandoh ahi.
Hitobang numei hi songa selih ding Mose’n danthua eipeh-u ahin, nangman iti nagel’em?” atiuve.
Ama hehsetna dinga lungthim a apatepna a hitia chu atiu ahi. Ahin Jesu akunin akhut chal’in tol ajih tai.
Ahivangin amahon adong tei adong teiyun ahile, ama adahdoh-in ajah uva, “Nalah uva chonsetna neilou penin ama-nu chu songin sep masapen hen,” ati.
Chuin akun kit’in akhut chal’in tol ajih kit tai.
Amahon chuche thu ajah phat’un alenpena pat alhumpen geiyin khat cheng-in apotdoh gamtauvin; Jesu changseh le alailunga um numeinu bou chu aumtan ahi.
Chuin Jesu adahdoh-in numeinu chu adongin, “Vo numei, amaho hoilam-ba hitauvem? Koiman themmo nachan lou hitam?” atile, amanun,
“Pakai, koiman themmo eichantapoi,” ati. Chuin Jesun, “Keiman jong themmo kachanpoi; chetan, tukal’in chonse kitta hih-in,” ati.
Hijeh chun Jesun ajah uva, “Keima vannoi vah kahi; kanung eijuiya chu muthima chu vah le louva hinna vah chu amu ding ahi,” ati.
Hichun Pharisee hon, “Nangman nangma thu nahettoh sah ahin, nathu hettoh sah adihpoi,” atiuve.

Jesun adonbut’in ajah uva, “Keiman keima thu kahettoh sah hijongle kathu hettoh sah adih ahi; ajeh chu keima hoiya hung kon, hoi lama kache ding, keiman kahei; nangho vangin hoiya kona hung kahi, hoi lama kache ding nahepouve.
Nanghon tahsa dungjuiya thu natanjiu ahi, keiman koima thu katanpoi.
Ahi, keiman thu tan jeng jong leng kathutan dih tah ahi; ajeh chu keima kachang kahipoi, keima kahin chule eihinsolpa ka-Pa chu ahi.
Nadan lekhauva mi ni thu hettoh sah chu adih ahi, tin akisune.
Keima keima thu hettohsah kahin, ka-Pa eihinsolpa chu keima thudol hettoh sah ahi,” ati.
Hijeh chun amahon ajah a, “Napa hoiya um ham?” atiuvin ahile, Jesun adonbut’in, “Nang hon keima jong neihepouvin, ka-Pajong nahepouve; nanghon keima neiheleu chun ka-Pa jong nahet dingu ahi,” ati.
Hicheng hi aman houin a athuhil’a sum kholna muna asei ahin, aphat alhin loulai jeh chun koiman aman pouve.
Hijeh chun aman ajah uva, “Kache mang ding, chule nang hon neihol dingu chule nachonset chenga nathi dingu; kache na lamala nangho hung thei lou,” ati.
Hijeh chun Juda ho chun, “Kache na lama nangho hung thei lou,” atin, o-le ama kithat ding hi-nga na?” atiuve.
Chuin aman amaho jah a, “Nangho noiya kon nahiuvin, keima chunga kon kahi; nangho hiche vannoiya mi nahiuvin, keima hiche vannoiya mi kahipoi.
Hichejeh a chu najah uva, ‘Nachonset chenga nathi dingu,’ kati ahi; kei hi ama chu kahi, natahsan louseuva nachonset chenga nathi dingu ahi,” ati.
Hijeh chun amahon ama jah a, “Koi nahim?” atiuve. Jesun amaho chu adonbut’in, “Atil’a pat’a najah uva kasei chula.
Thu sei ding tamtah le nangho chung chang thudol’a thutan ding kaneiye; ahinla eihinsolpa chu dihtah ahi; chule ama a kona kajah chengse chu keiman vannoi jah a kasei ahi,” ati.
Aman Pa thudol’a asei ahi chu amahon ahedoh pouvin ahi.
Hijeh chun Jesun “Nanghon Mihem Chapa hi nadop sang tengule keima hi ama chu kahi kacham a ima kabollou chule Pa chun eihil bang banga hicheng kasei ahi hi nahet dingu ahi.
Chule keima eisolpa chun eiumpinai, aman kachangin eilhapoi, ajeh chu keiman alung lhaina lam jeng bou kabol jingin ahi,” ati.
Hiche thu chu asei phat chun mi tamtah-in atahsantai.
Hijeh chun Jesun Juda mi atahsan ho jah a chun, “Nangho kathua hi naum jom jinguva ahile kaseijui tahbeh nahiuve;
chule thutah chu heuvin natin, thutah chun nalhadoh dingu ahi,” ati.
Amahon adonbut’un ajah a, “Keiho Abraham son kahiuvin, chule imatih chanin koima soh-in kalut khapouve; nakilhadoh dingu ahi,’ nati chu iti nati ham?” atiuve.
Jesun amaho chu adonbut’in, “Kaseipeh nahiuve, koi hijongle achonse chan chu chonset soh ahi.
Chule soh chu a-imatih chanin in’a acheng jipoi; chapa vang chu a-imatih chanin in’ah achengji.
Hijeh a chu Chapa chun lhadoh leu chun ongthol tahbeh ding nahiuve.
Abraham son nahiu chu kahenai; ahinla keima tha dingin neigouve; ajeh chu nalung sunguva kathun mun amupoi.
Keiman Pa koma kamu chanse kasei ahi; nanghon jong napauva kona najah chanseu nabol’u ahi,” ati.
Amahon adonbut’un ajah a, “Abraham kapau ahi,” atiuve. Jesun amaho jah a, “Nangho Abraham chate hileu chun Abraham thilbol nabol dingu ahi.
Ahinla Pathena kona thutah ja a najah uva seiya keima thana ding lungthim nangai touve. Abraham hitobang hin achonpoi.
Nanghon napau thilbol nabolu ahi,” ati. Amahon ajah a, “Keiho jaocha kahipouve. Pa khatseh bou kaneiyui, hichu Pathen ahi,” atiuve.
Jesun amaho jah a, “Pathen napau hile keima nei ngailut dingu ahi; ijeh-inem itile keima Pathena kona hungdoh kahi; keima kacham a hung kahipoi; aman eisol ahibouve.
Nanghon ibol’a kathu nahet louvu ham? Kathu hi na-ngai thei lou jeh-u ahi.

Napau Diabol’a kon nahibouvui; chule chuche napau lung got chu suh bulhit dingbou nanomui. Ama chu atil’a pat’a tolthat ahin, chule thutah a dinglou ahi; ajeh iham itile ama a chu thutah umlou ahi. Aman thujou asei komle ama chama aseiji ahi; ajeh chu ama mijou ahin, chule jou pa ahi.
Kei vangin thutah kasei ahi, hijeh chun nanghon neitahsan pouve.
Keima hi michonse ahi, tia ahet photna pe thei dinga nalah uva koi nahiuvem? Ahiloule thutah kasei ahile ibol’a neitahsan louvu ham?
Pathen a chun Pathen thu angaiye; nangho Pathen a nahipouve, hijeh a chun nangai louvu ahi,” ati.
Juda hon adonbut’un ajah a, “Nangma Samaria mi nahin chule thi lha vop nahi,” katiu hi dih lou ham?” atiuve.
Jesun adonbut’in, “Keima thi lha vop kahipoi; chule ka-Pa kajabol ahin, nanghon keima neijabol pouve.
Ahivangin keiman keima loupina ding kaholpoi; ahol’a le thutan khat aumnai.
Keiman nangho tahbeh beh a kaseipeh nahiuve, kathu nit chun itih chan hijongle thina amu lou ding ahi,” ati.
Chuin Juda hon ajah a, “Thi lha vop nahi, tun kahetauve. Abraham le themgaoho bonla athigam tauvin, nangman, “Kathu nit chun itih chan hijongle thina atep khah lou ding ahi,’ nati.
Kapuluiyu Abraham athitan, nangma ama sanga chungnungjo nahim? Chule themgaoho jong la athigam tauvin, nangman koi kahi nakiti ham?” atiuve.
Jesun adonbut’in, “Keima chang kichoian kahile kakichoiatna chu imacha hilou ahi; ahinla nanghon ka-Pathen ahi natiu hiche Ka-Pa chun keima eichoiat ahibouve.
Nanghon ama nahepouve. Keiman vang ama kahei; keiman ama chu kahepoi tileng nangho banga mijou kahi ding ahi. Ahinla keiman ama kahei, chule athu jong kangaiye.
Napuluiyu Abraham in keima nikho mu ding athanom in, chuin amun akipah lheh jengin ahi,” ati.
Chuin Juda hon ajah a, “Nakum kum som nga bon lhing lou laiya Abraham namutah-em?” atiuve.
Jesun ajah uva, “Keiman nangho tahbeh beh a kaseipeh nahiuve; keima Abraham masang peh a umsa jing kahi,” ati.
Chuin Juda hon asena ding song akilotauve; ahivangin Jesu akisel’in houin a kon chun achemangtan ahi.
Chuin ache achele apena pat’a mi mitcho khat amun;
chuin aseijuihon adongun, “Rabbi, hichepa apena mitchoa apen hi, ama chonsea o-le anu apa chonsea ham?” atiuve.
Jesun adonbut’in, “Ama chonsea ahipoi, anu le apa chonsea jong ahipoi, hichea hi Pathen natoh kiphonna dinga ahibouve.
Sun ahi petcha hi eisolpa na itoh dingu hivehta. Koiman na atoh thei louna jan hung lhung ding hita hi.
Vannoiya kaum laisea hi vannoi vah kahi,” ati.
Hiche chu aseiyin tol’ah achil aset lhan, achil chun bonlhoh asemin, bonlhoh chu mitchopa mit’a chun aloiyin ajah a,
“Chetan; Silo’am, @9(sol tina ahin)@7 twikul’ah gakiphet lhah tan,” ati. Chuin ama achen agaphet lhan ahile kho amun ahungtai.
Chuin aheng akoma chengse le masanga akhutdoji musa ho chun, “Touva khutdojia chu ama hi hilou haimo?” akititauve.
Abangin, “Ama hi ahi,” atiuvin; abang kimkhatsen, “Ahipoi, ama chutoh abange,” atiuvin ahi. Chuin aman, “Ama chu kahinai,” ati.
Chuin amahon ama chu adongun, “Achutile i-atile namit hah hitam?” atiuvin ahile,
aman adonbut’in, “Jesu atipau khun bonlhoh asema kamit’a aloiya, ‘Chen lang Silo’am ah gaphet lhan,’ eitia; chua kachea kagaphet lhah le kho kamu ahitai,” ati.
Chuin amahon ama chu adongun, “Ama chu hoiya umtam?” atiule; aman, “Kahepoi,” ati.
Chuin amahon masanga mitchopa chu Pharisee ho henga apuitauvin ahi.
Jesun bonlhoh asema amit’a aloi ni chu cholngah ni ahi.
Hijeh chun Pharisee hon jong, “Kho iti namu kit ham?” tin adongun ahile, aman ajah uva, “Aman bonlhoh kamit’a anun hichu kaphet lhah le kho kamu jenge,” ati.

Hichun Pharisee ho kimkhat’in, “Hichepa chu Pathena kon ahipoi, ijeh-inem itile cholngah ni anitpoi,” atiuvin; kimkhat vang chun, “Michonsen hitobang thil kidang abol thei ngaiyem?” atiuvin; hiti chun amaho lah a chun akibung khentauve.
Chuin amahon mitchopa chu adong kit leuvun, “Aman namit ahasah chu, nangman ama chu koi ahi natim?” atiule; aman, “Themgao,” ati.
Ama mitcho ahia kho amu kit thudol chu Juda hon khomupa nu le pa agakou masang seuvin atahsan pouvin ahi.
Chuin amahon amani chu adongun, “Apen a pat mitchoa penga natiu nachapa lhon chu ama hi hinam? Ahile tua iti kho amu ham?” atiuve.
Anu le apan adonbut lhonin, “Ama hi kachapa lhon ahinai, apen a mitchoa penga ahi chu kahe lhone;
tua itia kho amu ham vang kahe lhonpoi; chule kon amit ahasah ham jong kahe lhonpoi; ama dongun upatah ahi, aman achung chang thu kisei nante,” ati lhone.
Juda ho ginna anu le a pan achuti sei lhon ahi; ajeh chu, “Koi hijongle, ‘Ama Christa ahi,’ tia seidoh chu kikhopna in a kona nodoh ding, tia Juda ho amasanga dettah a kihoulhusa ahiuve.
Hiche jeh a chu anu le apan, “Ama upatah ahi, ama dongun,” ati lhon ahi.
Chuin amahon masanga mitchopa chu aveini na-in akouvun, “Pathen bou vahchoiyin, hichepa chu michonse ahi, ti keihon kaheuve,” atiuvin ahi.
Chuin aman adonbut’in, “Michonse ahi ahilou kahepoi; masang chun kamit achon tun kho kamui, hichebou hi kahei,” ati.
Amahon adong kit leuvin, “Ama chun i-nalom? I-aloa namit aboldam ham?” atiuvin ahile,
aman adonbut’in “Ajouvin kaseitame na-ngai hih-un, ibol’a najah nom kit leuvu ham? Nangho jong ama seijui nahi nomu ham?” ati.
Chuin amahon ama chu ahouseuvin, “Nangbou ama seijui nahi; keiho vang Mose seijui kahi bouvui.
Pathen in Mose jah a thu asei chu kaheuvin; hichepa vang hi hoilam kon ahi kahepouve,” atiuvin ahi.
Amapa chun adonbut’in ajah uva, “Hichu datmo aume, kamit hasah ta a ahivanga hoilam kon ahi nahet louvu chu.
Pathen in michonse ho thu angai jipoi; Pathen ngaisah le alung got lama chonpa thubou angaiye, ti iheuve.
Koiham khat’in apen a mitchoa penga amit ahasah-e, ti vannoi leiset umtil’a pat akijakha hih hel’e.
Ama Pathena kon hilou hile imacha abol thei louhel ding ahi,” ati.
Amahon adonbut’un ajah a, “Nang napum changa chonsetna penga keiho neihil’um?” atiuvin anodoh tauve.
Amahon ama chu anodoh tauve, ti thu Jesun a jan, chuin ama chu amun ajah a, “Nangman Mihem Chapa chu natahsan em?” ati.
Aman adonbut’in, “Pakai ama chu koiham, katahsan ding chu?” ati.
Jesun ajah a, “Nangman ama namutai chule najah a thuseiya hi ama chu ahi,” ati.
Chutah-in “Pakai, katahsane,” atin ama chu chibai abohtan ahi.
Chuin Jesun, “Kho mulou hon kho amuva chule khomuho amitchotna dinguva thuletoa vannoiya hi hunga kahi,” ati.
Chuche ajauvin avel’a um Pharisee hon ajah a, “Keiho jong mitcho kahiuvem?” atiuve.
Jesun ajah uva, “Mitcho hileu chun nachonset nau um lou ding ahin, tuvangin ‘Kho kamui,’ nati jeh-u chun nachonset nau uma ahitai,” ati.
“Keiman nangho tahben beh a kaseipeh nahiuve, kot’a lut louva gam danga kal’a kelngoi hong sunga lut chu gucha le michom ahi.
Kot’a lut vang chu kelngoi ho chinga ahi.
Ama chu kotngahpan kot ahonjin, chule kelngoite chun a-o aheuvin, chule aman akelngoi ho chu amin cheh-in akouvin apuidoh jin ahi.
Ahoidoh soh tengle aman alamkaiyin, kelngoi ho chun anung ajuijiuve, ajeh chu amahon ama o chu aheuve.
Midang nung vang jui louhel ding ahiuve, akoma kona jam mang jo ding ahibouvui; ajeh chu amahon midang ho o ahepouve,” ati.
Hiche thulem chu Jesun ajah uva aseiyin, ahivangin athusei chu ipi aseina ahi ahepouve.
Hijeh chun Jesun ajah uva asei kit leuvin, “Keiman nangho tahbeh beh a kaseipeh nahiuve, Keima hi kelngoi hong kot kahi.
Keima masanga hung ho jouse chu gucha le michom ahi soh keiyui; ahinla kelngoi hon athu u ana-ngai pouve.
Keima hi kot chu kahi; mi keiya lut chu huhhinga um ding ahi, chule lut le pot lea . chule ham nea lhatle na amu ding ahi.
Gucha chu agu dingle athat dinga chule asumang dinga bou hung ahi. Keima vang amahon hinna aneibe chehna dinguva hunga kahi.
Keima hi kelngoi chingpha kahi. Kelngoi chingpha chun kelngoi ho dingin ahinna apejie.
Kelngoi chingtah hilou, kelngoi ho ama a hilou thalah vang chun ngei hung amu teng le kelngoi ho chu adalhan ajam jitai; chutengle ngei chun amanin asuchehji tauve.
Ijehinem itile ama thalah ahibouvin, kelngoi ho ding chu imacha agelpoi.
Keima hi kelngoi chingpha kahi; Pan keima eihet chule keiman jong Pa chu kahet bang chun.
keiman keima a jouse kahei, keima a jousen jong keima eiheuve; chule kelngoi ho dingin kahinna jong kapei.
Hiche honga hilou jong kakelngoi aum nalaiye; keiman hiche ho jong chu kaga hoilut ding; chule amahon ka-o ahet dingu; chule hon khat aching khat hung hidoh ding ahi.
Keiman kahinna chu kakilah kit dinga kalha ding ahin; hichejeh a chu Pan keima eingailut ahi.
Khattouvin eilahpeh ding thu ahipoi; keiman kachama kalha ding ahibouve. Lha jong lha theiya chule kilah kit theina thu kaneiye. Hiche thupeh hi ka-Pa a kona kamu ahi,” ati.
Thu chucheng jeh chun Juda ho abung bungin akikhen kit tauve.
Alah uva tamtah-in, “Hichepa hi thi lha vop le mi-ngol ahi; ibol’a athu na-ngaiyu ham?” atiuvin;
adangsen, “Thu hitobang hi thi lha vop thusei ahipoi. Thi lhan mi mitcho ho mit ahasah ngaiyem?” atiuve.
Chuin Jerusalem a houin phudoh kut aumin,
hichu phalbi lai ahin, Jesu houin a Solomon hongcha a chun avah le len;
hichun Juda hon a um kimvel un, “Itih chan neilung gimsah dingu ham? Christa nahile kichentah-in neiseipeh un,” atiuve.
Jesun adonbut’in, “Keiman najah uva kaseitai, ahivangin nanghon natahsan pouve. Ka-Pa min a thil kabol chengse hi kathudol hettohsah ahi.
Ahivangin nanghon natahsan pouve, ajeh chu nangho kakelngoi lah a nahipouve.
Keima kelngoi ho vangin ka-o aheuve, keiman jong amaho kahei, chule amahon kanung eijui jiuve.
Chule keiman amaho chu tonsot hin kemlou kapeji; chutia chu amaho itih chan a mangthah lou ding ahiuve; chujongle koiman kakhut’a kona amaho chu eilahpeh lou ding ahi.
Ka-Pa amaho keima eipea chu ima jouse chunga chunnungpen ahi. Hiche Pa a kona chu koiman lahpeh thei lou ahi.
Keima le Pa chu pum khat kahi lhone,” ati.
Chuin Juda hon ase nading song akilo tauve.
Jesun amaho chu adonbut’in, “Pa a kona chu natohpha tamtah kavetsah nahitauve; chuche na kitong ho hoipen jeh a chu keima songa neiseu ham?” ati.
Juda hon adonbut’un, “Na-phatoh jeh a songa kaseu ahipoi. Pathen nataitom jeh ahibouve, chujongle mihem nahinasa Pathen nakihisah jeh ahi,” atiuve.
Jesun adonbut’in ajah uva, “Nangho hi pathen ho nahiuve, kati ahi, tia nadan lekhabu’va kisun hih am?
Pathen thu lhunna ho bon pathenho atia ahile, Pathen lekhabu thu chu keh thei ahipoi.
Pan asuh thenga vannoiya asol chun, ‘Pathen Chapa kahi,’ kati jeh a ibol’a Pathen nataitome, neitiu ham?
Ka-Pa na katoh loule neitahsan dauvin.
katoh ahivangle Pa chu keiya auma chule keima Pa a kaum hi nahet theiyuva nahet chen theina dingun keima neitahsan hihjongleu chun na kitong ho chengse beh hi tahsan un,” ati.
Chuin amahon ama chu mat dingin ago kit tauve, ahinla ama akhut’uva konin apotdoh-in ache mangtan ahi.
Chuin Jordan gal’a John in amasa baptize achansahna lama chun achen aga umtai.
Chuin mi tamtah ahenga ahungun amaho chun, “John in melchihna kidang ima avetsah poi, hichepa vang hi John in athudol asei jouse tahbeh ahi soh keiye,” atiuvin;
hiche koma chun mi tamtah-in atahsan tauvin ahi.
Mariam le asopinu Martha chenna Bethany khoa chun mi khat amin Lazarus atiu chu ati anan;
chule ana a chu Pakai thao nua asama akeng theh gima Mariam sopipa Lazarus chu ahi.
Hijeh chun asopinute nin ahenga mi asol lhonin ajah a, “Pakai, ven nangman na-ngailut chu anai,” agah ti sah lhone.
Ahivangin Jesun ajah phat’in, “Hiche nat hi thina ding ahipoi; hichea chu Pathen Chapa choiatna aumna dinga Pathen loupina ding bou ahi,” ati.
Jesun Martha le asopinu chule Lazarus chu angailut ahi.
Hiti chun anai ti ajah chun aumna a chun ni ni aumna laiyin ahi.
Chuin hiche nung chun aseijuiho jah a, “Judea gama ache kit tau hite,” ati.
Aseijuihon ajah a. “Rabbi, Juda ho chunla songa se ding nagouvin; khu lama nache kit ding ham?” atiuve.
Jesun adonbut’in, “Ni khat sunga hi nidan som le ni um lou ham? Mi khat sun a vahlea chu vannoi vah amu jeh-in akisupoi.
Jan a vahlea vang chu ama sunga vah aum loujeh-in akisui,” ati.
Hicheng chu aseiyin, chujouvin ajah uva, “Igolpau Lazarus a-ihmutai, ahin a-ihmut sukhang dinga kache ding ahi,” ati.
Hijeh chun aseijuihon ajah a, “Pakai, a-ihmuttah a ahile damta vehta,” atiuve.
Jesun hichu athi aseina ahin, ahivangin amahon kicholdo dinga ihmut aseiyin angaitouve.
Hijeh chun Jesun ajah uva asei chenin, “Lazarus chu athia ahitai;
nanghon natahsan theina dingun chukoma kaum lou chu nangho dingin kakipah-e; hijong le tun hungun ahenga cheu hite,” ati.
Hichun Thomas Diduma atiu chun aseijuiho jah a, “Cheuvin, eiho jong amatoh thi tha dingin cheuhite,” ati.
Hichun Jesu ahungin lhana akoiyu ni li ahitai, ti ahetai.
Bethany chu Jerusalem kom ahin, ching som le ching nga ahi;
Juda ho tamtah Martha le Mariam henga chu amani lungmonsah dinga hunga anaumun ahi.
Hiti chun Martha’n Jesu ahunge, ti ajah phat chun apotdoh-in agakimu topi’n; Mariam vang chu in’a chun atouna laiye.
Hijeh chun Marthan ajah a, “Pakai, nangma hikoma um hile chun, kasopipa thi lou dinga.
Tujeng injong nangman Pathen henga nathum chan chu Pathen in napeh ding kahei,” ati.
Jesun amanu jah a, “Nasopipa thoudoh kit ding ahi,” ati.
Martha’n ajah a, ‘Ni nunung nia tho kit nia athodoh ding chu kahenai,” ati.
Jesun amanu jah a, “Keima hi thokitna le hinna kahi; keima eitahsan a chu thi jong le hing ding ahi;
chule koi hijongle ahinga keima eitahsan a chu itih hijong le thi lou ding ahi. Hiche hi natahsan em?” ati.
Amanun ajah a, “Henge Pakai, katahsane; nangma Pathen Chapa Christa vannoiya hung dinga chu nahi,” ati.
Hiche chu asei jouvin achemangin asopinu Mariam guhthim in akouvin, “Houhil chu hikoma aumin, nakouve,” ati.
