Tukal keiman nangho soh kati lou ding nahitauve, ijeh-inem itile soh chun apakai thilbol ahepoi; golte kati ding nahitauve; ijeh-inem itile ka-Pa a kona kajah ho jouse aboncha nangho kahetsah soh nahitauve.

Nanghon keima neilhen u ahipoi, keimajoh-in nangho kalhendoh a nacheuva haga nagauva chule nagau aumna dinga kapansah nahiuve, ipi hijongle nagot chanu kamin a Pa henga nathumu chu aman napeh theina dingun.
Nang ho khat le khat nakingailuto chehna dinguva thupeh hicheng hi kapeh nahiuve.
Vannoiyin nahot’u le nangho nahot masanguva keima eihot chu naheuve.
nangho vannoiya hileu chun vannoiyin a ma a chu angailut ding ahin; tunla nangho vannoiya nahi louvu vannoiya kona keiman kalhendoh nahiuvin, hiche jeh a chu vannoiyin nahot’u ahi.
Najah uva kathusei ‘Soh apakai sangin achungnung jopoi,’ kati chu geldoh-un. Amahon kei eibolseuva chu nangho nabolset dingu ahi. Kathu nit leu nangho thu jong anit dingu ahi.
Amavang thil hicheng hi keima min jal’a nachunguva ahinbol dingu ahi, amahon eisolpa ahet lou jeh uva chu.
Keima kahunga ajah uva thu kahung sei lou hile chonset anei lou dingu ahin; tuvangin achonset apaomea akilepna dingu aumtapoi.
Keima eihoa chu ka-Pa jong ahot ahi.
Keiman alah uva mi koima dangin abol khah lou thil kabol lou hi le chonset anei lou dingu ahin; tuvangin amahon keima le ka-Pa kakop lhonin eimutauvin, ho jong eihotauve.
Ahoi hijongle adanthu bu’va, “Ajeh beiyin eiho’uve,’ tia kisun chu guilhunna dinga abol’u ahi.
Chule Lhamonsah kahinsol ding Pa koma kona hungdoh ding. Lhagao dihtah chu ahung teng vang le ama chun keima thudol ahettohsah ding;
chule nangho jong atil’a pat kaumpi jing nahi jeh-uva chu kathu hettohsah a napan dingu ahi.
“Nakipal lhuh louna dinguva thu hicheng hi kaseipeh nahiuve.
Amahon kikhopna a kona nahin kaidoh dingu; ahi, phat chu hung lhung ding ahi, chutengle koi hile nathat chan u chu Pathen dinga napha tonga kingaito ding ahi.
Amahon Pa le keima eihet loujeh uva thil hicheng chu abol dingu ahi.
Ahivangin hiti ho phat chu ahung lhun teng le keimatah-in kaseipehsa chengseu hi nageldohna dinguva thu hicheng hi kaseipeh nahiuve. Keiman nangho kaumpi nahiuva ahile atil’a pat’a kaseida ahi.
“Tuvanga eihinsolpa henga kache ding ahitai, ahivangin, ‘Hoiya nache ding ham?’ tin koiman neidong pouve.
Ahin thu hicheng chu kasei jeh-in nalungu lunghem adimjotai.
Hijongle keiman nangho thutah beh kaseipeh nahiuve, kache hi nangho dinga phajo ahi; ijeh-inem itile keima kache lou le Lhamonsah chu nahenguva hung lou ding ahi.
Ama chu hunga chonset thudol chonphat thudol, chule thutan thudola vannoi mite themmo chan thudol ahetphotsah ding ahi.
Chonset thudol chu, ijeh ham itile amahon keima eitahsan pouve;
chonphat thudol chu, ijehham itile keima Pa henga che ding kahi, chule nanghon keima neimu lou dingu ahitai;
chule thutan thudol chu, ijeh ham itile hiche vannoi pipupa thu kitan a ahitai.
Nangho jah a sei ding thu tamtah kaneiye, hijongle tun nadol joupouve.

Lhagao dihtah chu ahung teng vang le ama chun thutah lam jousea nangho napuihoi dingu ahi; ijeh-inem itile aman achama asei lou ding, ajah chan asei ding bou ahi, chule khonung thusoh ding naseitohpeh dingu ahi.
Ama chun keima eichoiat ding ahi, ajeh chu kanei chengse chu aman alah a nangho nahetsah dingu ahi.
Pa nei chengse chu aboncha keiya ahi; hiche jeh a chu kanei chengse chu aman alah a nangho nahetsah dingu ahi, kati ahi.
“Chomcha khat jou le nanghon keima neimu lou dingu ahitai, chule chomcha khat jou le neimu kit dingu ahi,” ati.

Hichea chun aseijuiho khat le khat akihouvun. “Chomcha khat jou le neimu lou dingu, chule chomcha khat jou le neimu kit dingu, chule ijeh-inem itile keima Pa henga che ding kahi, ati hi ipi eiseipeh-u ham?” akitiuve.
Hijeh chun amahon, “Chomcha khat jou, ati hiche hi ipi atina ham, ipi asei ihepouve,” atiuve.
Adoh nomu chu Jesun ahen ajah uva, “Chomcha khat jou le neimu lou dingu, chomcha khat jou le neimu kit dingu, kati chu itidol ahi khat le khat kidongtoa nahiuvem?
Keiman nangho tahbeh a kaseipeh nahiuve, nangho nakauva namao dingu, vannoi mite vang chu kipah ding ahiuve; nangho nalunghem dingu, ahivanga nalunghem nau chu kipana hung hidoh ding ahi.
Numei aso dinga anat teng le athohgim lheh jin, acha chu asolhah teng vang le vannoiya mihem khat apen jeh chun akipah jin ahile alungdon hesoh chu ahejitapoi.
Hiche banga chu nangho jong tua nalunghemu ahi. Ahivangin keiman nangho kamu kit ding nahiuve. chutengle nalungu kipah ding, chule hiche nakipanau chu koiman nalahpeh lou dingu ahi.
Hiche ni chule keima imacha neidoh lou dingu ahi. Keiman nangho tahbeh beh a kaseipeh nahiuve. Pa henga ima nathumu le aman keima min a napeh dingu ahi.
Tugei hin nanghon kaminin ima nathum hih laiyuve; nakipanau suhcham kima aumna dingin, thumun chutile namu dingu ahi.
“Thu hicheng hi keiman nangho jah a alema kasei ahi; alema sei louva phongtah a nangho Pa thu kahetsahna dingu phat hung lhung ding ahi.
Hiche ni chule kamin a nathum dingu ahi; chule nangho dingin keima Pa henga tao vinge, kati ahipoi;
ijeh-inem itile Pan amatah-in nangho na-ngailu’ve, ijeh-inem itile nanghon keima nei ngailu’vin, chule keima Pa a kona hung kahi natahsan tauvin ahi.
Pa koma kona vannoiya hunga kahin, vannoi kadalhah a Pa henga che kit ding kahi,” ati.
Chutah-in aseijuiten, “Ven, nangman tun thu alema seita louvin phongtah-in naseiye.
Nangma ijakai hesoh nahin, mi koima nadoh ding chu na-ngaipoi, hichu tun kaheuve; hichea hin nangma Pathen koma kona hung nahi, ti katahsanui.” atiuve.
Jesun amaho chu adonbut’in. “Tua bou natahsan um?
Veuvin, nangho nangma nangma a cheh a navacheh soh keiyuva keima kachanga neidalhah dingu phat ahung lhunge, ahi, ahung lhungtai; ahivangin keima kachang kahipoi; ijeh-inem itile Pan keima eiumpinai.
Nanghon keiya lungmonna namu theina dinguva thu hicheng hi najah uva kasei ahi. Vannoiyah genthei hesohna naneiyui; ahivangin lungnom un, keiman vannoi kajoutai,” ati.
Jesun thu hicheng chu aseiyin van lam aven, “Pa, phat chu ahung lhungtai; Chapan nangma nachoiat theina dingin na-Chapa choian in.
Nangman ama napeh ho jouse chu aboncha aman tonsot hin kemlou apeh dinga, nangman ama chu mi jouse chunga thuneina napeh ahi.
Pathen tah khatseh nangma le nasol Jesu Christa tah chu ahetdoh dingu, hiche hi tonsot hinna ahi.
Nangman bol dinga thil neipeh chu kajouvin leiset chungah nangma kachoian tai.
Chule tun, Pa vannoi um masanga nangmatoh ium laiya iloupina chun nangmatah toh kigom in neichoin in.
Nangman vannoiya kona neipeh miho jah a namin kaphon ahitai; amaho nanga ahiuvin, nangin amaho chu keima neipeh ahi; chule amahon nathu anit tauve.
Tun amahon nangman keima neipeh thil chengse hi nanga kon ahi ahetauve.
Ijeh-inem itile nangman keima neipeh thuho chu keiman amaho kapen, chule amahon hiti ho chu asangun chule keima nanga kona hung kahi kichenin aheuvin, chule nangma sol kahi atahsan tauve.
Amaho dinga katao ahi; vannoi dinga katao ahipoi; nangman keima neipeh ho dinga bou katao ahi, ijeh-inem itile amaho nanga ahiuve.
Chule keiya jouse chu nanga ahin, nanga chu keiya ahi; chule amahoa hin choianin kaume.

Chule keima vannoiya hi kaum lou ding ahitai, amaho vang hi vannoiya aumna laiyuve, chule keima nahenga hung ding kahitai. Ka-Pa theng, eini pumkhat ihi banga amaho jong pumkhat ahi theina dingun, nangman amaho hi hongin.
Keiman amahotoh kaum laiya neiminpeh namina chu amaho hi kanahon ahi; amaho hi kahongin khatcha jong amangthah aumpouve; Pathen lekhabu thu guilhun nan mangthah chapa bou chu amangthah tai.
Tuvangin nahenga hung ding kahitai; chule kakipana amahoa auma anei kimna dinguva vannoiya hiche thu hi kasei ahi.
Keiman nathu amaho kapetai; chule keima vannoiya kahilou banga amaho jong vannoiya ahiloujeh-un vannoi miten ahotauve.
Nangman amaho hi vannoiya konin ladoh-in tia katao ahipoi, agilouva kon chun huhdoh-in, katijoh ahibouve.
Keima vannoiya kahilou bangin amaho jong vannoiya ahipouve.
Thutah chun amaho hi suthengin; nangma thu chu thutah ahi.
Nangman keima vannoiya neisol banga keiman jong amaho hi vannoiya kasol ahi.
Chule amaho hi thutah a suh thenga aum theina dinguva amaho jal’a keima kisuthenga kahi.
Hite ho cheng jeng dinga tao kahipoi, amaho thua kona keima eitahsan ho jouse dinga jong,
amaho chu pumkhat ahina dinguva, Pa, keima nangma sol kahi hi vannoi miten atahsan theina dinguva nangma keiya nauma keima nanga kaum banga hi, amaho jong einia aum theina dinga katao ahi.
Chule keima nangin neisol’a chule neingailut, chule hite ho jong chutobanga na-ngailut, hichechu vannoi miten ahetdohna dingun, eini pumkhat ihi banga amaho jong pumkhat ahiuva,
keima amahoa chule nangma Keiya nauma, amaho pumkhat ahiu, achamkimna dingun, nangman keima neipeh loupina chu, hiche loupina chu keiman amaho kapetai.
Pa, nangman neipeh loupina chu nangin neipeh ho hin amu theina dingun, keima umna a chun kakoma amaho jong umleu kati ahi; vannoi bul kiphudoh masanga nangman neingailut ahijeh chun.
Vo ka-Pa chondih tah, vannoi miten nangma nahepouvin, kei vangin nangma kahen, chule nangman keima neisol hi, hite ho hin ahetauve.
Nangman kei neingailutna ngailut chu amahoa auma, chule keima jong amahoa kaumna dinga namin amaho hi kahetsah ahitai, kahetsah jing ding ahi,” ati.
Jesun thu hicheng chu aseiyin apotdoh-in Kidron vagal hon umna a chun aseijuiho toh agalkaiyun, chuin hon sunga chun amale aseijuiho aluttauve.
Ama matsah a pang Judas jong chun hiche kom mun chu ahet ahi; ijeh-inem itile Jesun aseijuite apuijiya hikoma chu tamtah vei chejiuva ahi.
Chutah-in Judas chun sepaihon chule thempu pipuiho le Pharisee hoa kona sottolle ho aloiyin, meivah, meisel, chule hem manchah athouvin hiche kom mun chu alhung tauve.
Hichun achunga ipi ahungso ding Jesun abonchan ahen, apotdoh-in amaho chu, “Koi nahol’u ham?” tin agadongin ahile,
amahon adonbut’un, “Nazareth Jesu,” atiuve. Jesun ajah uva, “Keima hi kahi,” ati. Ama matsah a pang Judas jong chu amaho lah a chu dinga ahi.
Hiche chun, aman ajah uva, “Keima hi kahi,” ati chun anung chonun, tol’ah alhu jengun ahi.
Chuin aman adong kit leuvin, “Nanghon koi nalol’u ham?” ati. Amahon, “Nazareth Jesu,” atiuve.
Jesun adonbut’in, “Keima hi kahi,” tia najah uva kaseitah chula em; hijeh chun keima neihol’u ahile hite ho hi chesah-un,” ati.
Nangman keima neipeh chengse khatcha jong kamansah poi; tia asei chu guilhun nadinga chutia ahi.
Hichun Simon Peter in chemjam khat anei ahin, asatdoh-in thempu chungnung sohpa asat le ajetlam bilkol asat lhatai. Sohpa min chu Malchus ahi.
Chuin Jesun Peter jah a, “Chemjam chu apaiya khumin, Pan eipeh khona chu kadon lou ding ham?” ati.
Chuin sepai hon le apipui pau toh chule Juda ho sottolle hon Jesu amanun, akanun,
Annas henga apui masauve; ijeh ham itile ama chu chuche kuma thempu Chungnunga pang Caiaphas nupapa ahi.
Hiche Caiaphas chu ahi, “Miho jouse dinga mi khat athi aphajoi,” tia Juda ho thumop chu.
Chuin Simon Peter in Jesu nung ajuiyin aseijui dang khattoh; chuche seijui chu thempu chungnung chutoh kihea ahin. Jesu toh tha khat’in thempu chungnung innpi tol’ah alut lhontan ahi.
Peter vang chu kot polam a ading dingin ahi. Hiche chun thempu chungnungtoh kihea seijui chu ahungin kot ngahnu jah a chun aseiyin Peter chu insungah apuilut tai.
Hichun hiche kot ngah nungahnu chun Peter jah a, “Nang jong hichepa seijuiho lah a khat nahim?” atile, aman, “Kahipoi,” atitai.
Hiche koma chu sohho le sottolle hon adapjeh a meihol akitiuva adinmuna mei aoiyu ahin, Peter jong adingin mei chu aoiyin ahi.
Hiche chun thempu chungnung chun Jesu aseijuiho le athuhil thudol adongtan ahi.
Jesun ama adonbut’in, “Keiman vannoi mite anga phongtah a kasei anahitai; keiman kikhopna inhoa le chule Juda ho jouse kaikhomna hou in a kana hil jingpeh ahi, guh thima kasei aumpoi.
Ibol’a keima neidoh ham? Ajah uva ipi kasei aja a amaho chu dongtan; ven, ipi thu kasei amahon ahenauve,” ati.
Aman thu hicheng chu aseiyin ahile akoma ding sottolle ho lah a khat’in angeiphe abengin, “Thempu chungnung hitia chu kidonbut ngaiyem?” ati.
Jesu ama chu adonbut’in, “Thu gilou kasei ahile kathusei gilou aphot chenna neihetsah-in; thupha kasei ahile ibol’a neiden ham?” ati.
Chuin Annas chun ama chu akikan pumin Caiaphas thempu chungnung hengah agahsol tai.
Hichea chu Simon Peter in dinmun a mei aoi ahin, chuin amahon, “Nangma jong aseijuiho lah a khat nahim?” tin adongun ahile, ama akilep’in. “Kahipoi,” ati.
Thempu chungnung sohpa Peter in abilkol asat lhah pehpa inko khat’in ajah a, “Keiman hon a chu nangma amatoh kamu lou nahim?” atin ahile.
Peter akilep kit tai; chule chutah chun ah akhongtan ahi.

Chutah chun amahon Caiaphas in a konin gamvaipopa in lama Jesu akaitauve; hichu jingkah ahin; ahivangin kalchuh kut an aneh theina dingun, akisuh boh louna dingun gamvaipo inpia chun amaho alut pouve.
Hijeh chun Pilate apotdoh-in amaho chu adongin, “Hichepa hehna achunga ipi thu naneiyum?” ati.
Amahon adonbut’un ajah a, “Ama hi khangse lou hile nangma khut’a pedoh pou vinge,” atiuve.
Chuin Pilate’in ajah uva, “Nanghon ama hi puiyun lang nangho dan ngaiyin athu tantauvin,” ati. Juda hon adonbut’un, “Keiho thua mi thana ding dan aumpoi,” atiuve.
Ama hi iti thia athi ding thudol Jesun asei chu guilhunna dinga chutia ahi.
Hiche chun Pilate gamvaipo inpi sungah a alut kit’in Jesu akouvin ajah a, “Nangma Judate lengpa nahim?” ati.
Jesun adonbut’in, “Hichu nangman nachama natiha, o-le mi khat touvin keima thudol naseipeh ham?” ati.
Pilate’in adonbut’in, “Keima Juda mi kahim? Navai mite le thempu pipuihon kakhut’a eipeh nahi chu; ipi nabolsetba ham?” ati.
Jesun adonbut’in, “Keima kagam hiche vannoi hi ahipoi; kagam hiche vannoi hi hile Juda ho khut’a eikipeh doh louna dinga kasoh ten asat dingu ahitan: tunla kagam hichea ahipoi,” ati.

Chuin Pilate’in, “Ahile nangma leng nahim?” atile; Jesun, “Leng kahi chu naseikhai. Thutah thu hettohsah dinga hiche dinga hi hung penga, hiche dinga hi vannoiya hunga kahi. Thutah he chan chun ka-o angaiye,” ati.
Pilate’in ajah a, “Ipi ham thutah chu?” ati. Chuin hiche chu atin Juda ho henga chun agapotdoh kit’in ajah uva, “Achung ah themmona kamudoh hih hel’e;
ahivangin nanghon kalchuh kut le mi khat nakilhadoh peh dingu chonna ngai khat naneiyui; hijeh chun Juda lengpa hi lhadoh peh leu veng nalungu ham?” ati.
Chutah chun “Hichepa hi hi-hih hen. Barabbas joh bouve,” atin asamtauve. Barabbas chu gucha michom khat ahi.
Chutah-in Pilate’in Jesu alan ajep tai.
Chuin sepaihon ling lukhuh apheh-un akhuhpeh-un, chule pon sandup asilpeh-un,
chuin akoma ahungun, “Chibai, Judate lengpa!” atiuvin adeng pantauvin ahi.
Chuin Pilate agapot kit leuvin ajah uva, “Veuvin akhan gitlouna ima kamu lou nahetna dinguva ama nahenguva kahin puidoh ahi,” ati.
Hiche chun Jesu ling lukhuh khuh le pon sandup sil pum chun ahung potdoh in, chuin Pilate’in ajah uvah, “Veuvin, Mihem hi!” ati.

Hiche chun thempu pipuiho le sottol le hon ama chu amutah un, ‘Thingpel’a khenbeh-in thingpel’a khenbeh-in!” tin asamtauve. Pilate’in, “Nangmahon kaiyun lang thingpel’a khenbeh tauvin; ajeh chu keiman akhan gitlouna kamupoi,” ati.
Juda hon adonbut’un, “Keihon dan khat kaneiyui; hiche dan dungjuiya chu thi dingdol ahi, ama Pathen Chapa akihisah jeh chun,” atiuve.
Pilate’in hiche aseiyu chu ajah phat chun akicha cheh jengtan;
gamvaipo inpi sungah alut kit’in Jesu jah a, “Nangma hoiya kon nahim?” ati. Ahivangin Jesun iman adonbut poi.
Hijeh chun Pilate’ in ajah a,“Neihou lou ding ham? Nangma lhadohna ding jong chule thingpel’a khetbehna ding jong thu kanei hi nahet lou ham?” ati.
Jesun adonbut’in, “Chunga kona kipe lou hile chun nangman kachunga thuneina him him nanei lou ding ahi; hijeh chun nakhut’a eipedohpa chonsetna achungnunge,” ati.
Hiche chun Pilate’in ama chu lhadoh ding ago tan ahi; ahinla Juda hon asam un, “Nangman mipa hi nalhadoh le Caesar jol nahilou ahi; ama lenga kisem chan chu Caesar douna thusei ahi,” atiuve.
Pilate’in thu chucheng ajah phat chun Jesu chu ahinpuidoh-in chuin song lhongnal atiu Hebrew paova Gabbatha atiu thu tanna muna chun atoutan ahi.
Hichu kalchuh dinga kigot ni, nidan gup dontah ahi; chuin Juda ho jah a, “Veuvin, nalengpau hi!” ati.

Hijeh chun amaho a-aosot jengun, “Sumangin, sumangin, thingpel’ah khenbeh-in!” atiuvin ahile, Pilate’in ajah uva, “Nalengpau thingpel’a kakhetbeh ding ham?” atile; thempu pipuihon adonbut’un, “Keihon Caesar tailou leng kaneipouve,” atiuvin ahi
Chutah-in aman ama chu thingpel’a khetbeh dingin akhut’uvah apedoh tai.
Hiche chun amahon akaiyun; chuin athingpel akiput’in Lugu mun atiu, Hebrew paova Golgotha atiu, mun chu jonin achedohtan ahi.
Hikoma chun ama thingpel’ah akhenbeh-un, chule mi ni asih langto gel’ah amatoh akhetbeh thauvin, Jesu chu alai lhai.
Chuin Pilate’in amin chan lekha’n asunin, “Nazareth Jesu, Judate lengpa, tia kisun thingpel leh a chun atah-in ahi.
Hijeh chun Jesu thingpel’a akikhet behna mun chu khopi nai ahijeh chun, hiche min chan chu Juda ho tamtah-in asimun; hichu Hebrew paotoh, Latin paotoh, chule Greek paova kisun ahi.
Hijeh chun Juda ho thempu pipuihon Pilate jah a, “Nazareth Jesu, Judate lengpa,’ tin sun hih-in; aman ‘Keima Judate lengpa kahi,’ ati, tin sun bouvin,” atiuve.
Pilate’in adonbut’in, “Kisuna kisun jouta,” ati.

Chuin sepaihon Jesu chu thingpela akhetbeh jouvun, aponsil alauvin, hal li asouvin sepai khat khat hal khat hal khat achangui; asangkhol jong chu alauvin; asangkhol chu khui lou ahin, alua pat ato geiya kikhong lhungkei ahi.

Hijeh chun khat le khat akihouvun, “Pathen lekha bu thu; ‘Kaponsil akihomun, Kasangkhol avangpha pha chang hen, tin vang asantauve,’ ti chu guilhunna dingin hiche hi botse pou hite, koipen chang am, vang kiveu hite,” akitiuve.
Hichejeh chun sepaihon hiti chun hicheng chu aboltauve. Ahin Jesu thingpel koma chun anutoh anu sopinu, Mariam Clopas inneipi toh Mariam Magdalene ading jingun ahi.
Jesun anu le aman angailut aseijui chu akoma adin amu phat chun anu jah a “Numei, ven nachapa chu,” ati.
Chuin aseijui jah a ma chun, “Ven, nanu chu,” ati. Chuin hiche pettah a pat chun seijui chun anu chu ama in’ah apuitai.
Hiche jou chun Jesun thil ijakai akichaisoh chu ahen, Pathen lekhabua thu chu guilhunsoh thei nan “Kadang achah-e!” ati.
Chukoma chu bel khat’a theitwi thuh kitung ahin, chuin twichop phon theitwi thuh dimset’in hyssop mol leh a atah-un, akamtoh agah sutouvin ahi.
Chuin Jesun theitwi thuh chu adonin, “Akichaitai,” Ati. Chuin akaikun alhagao alhadoh tan ahi.

Chuin kigin ni ahijeh chun cholngah nia thilong ho chu thingpel’a aumden louna dingin @9(Cholngah ni chula ni loupi ni ahin)@7, Juda hon Pilate henga akenggu heboh ding le along galah mangna ding athumun ahi.
Hichun sepaiho chu ahungun akikhetbehpi amasapa kengle khatpa keng chu aheh bongui.
Ahin Jesu kom ahung geiyun athisa anahitah chu amu’vin akeng aheh bong tapouve;
achuti vangin sepaiho lah a khat chun atengin anah agahsun in ahile, chua chun thisan le twisih ahung longlha paijen jengin ahi.
Chule amupatah chun ahettohsah ahi; chule ama thu hettohsah chu tahbeh ahi; chule aman atahbeh asei ahi chu ahei; nanghon jong natahsan theina dingu ahi.
Pathen lekhabua ‘Agu khatcha jong kiheh bong lou ding ahi,’ ati chu guilhunna dinga thil hicheng chu soh a ahitai.
Pathen lekhabu thu dangman, ‘Asutpau chu avet dingu ahi,’ ati.

Chuin hicheng jou chun Arimathea Joseph Jesu seijui khat, amavang Juda ho gin a guh thima hia hin, Jesu long chu pohdoh dingin Pilate henga agathum in ahile, Pilate’in anaphal’e. Hijeh chun ama ahungin along chu apomang tai.
Chuin Nicodemus, atil’a jan a Jesu henga hunga chun Myrrh le Aloes thao kihal seer som nga toh ahin choiyin ahi.
Chuti chun amahon Jesu long chu alauvin Juda ho kivui ngai bangin lounam tuitoh tupat pon nemin atomtauvin ahi.
Chule thingpela akhetbeh nau mun a chu hon khat uma ahin, hon a chu koima lupsahna khah louhel lhan thah khat uma ahi.
Hijeh chun Juda ho kigin ni ahijeh chun lhan chu akomcha ahiman chun chukoma chun Jesu chu alupsah tauvin ahi.
Chuin hapta ni masa ni jingin kho athim nalaiyin Mariam Magdalene chu lhan a chun agachen ahile song chu lhan a kona tahdohsa aum agamui.
Hiche chun amanu Simon Peter le seijui dang, Jesun angailut henga chun alhaijel’in ajah lhon’ah, “Pakai chu lhan a konin apomang tauve, chule hoiya alupsah-u kahepouve,” ati.
Hichejeh chun Peter achedoh-in seijui dangpa jong chu ahi lhonin lhan lama chu ache lhone.
Chuin thakhat’in alhai lhonin ahile seijui dang chun Peter akhel’in lhan phung chu alhung masatai.
Chuin akunin asung agah vet le tupat ponnem ho um chu amun, ahivangin asungah alutpoi.
Simon Peter jong hiche chun anung nungah ahungin, chuin lhan sunga chun alut tai; chuin tupat pon nem ho aum chule,
alu chunga um ultheh pon chu tupat ponnem ho chutoh umtha louva akijel’a atuma anaum agamun ahi.
Chutah chun seijuidang lhan phung lhung masajo pa jong chu alut’in amun atahsan tai.
Ajeh iham itile athia kona thoudoh kit ding tia asei Pathen lekhabua thu chu ahet lou laiyu ahi.
Chuti chun aseijuite ni chu ain lam gel’a ache mang lhontan ahi.
Mariam vang chu lhan pama chun adingin akap kap’in; aka pum chun akunin lhan sung chu agahven ahile.
aban a bang Vantil ni Jesu long alupsah nauva chu khat alulhuna atouva khat akeng todop’a atou amui.
Chuin amani chun ajah a, “Numei, ibol’a naka ham?” ati lhonin ahile, aman ajah lhon’ah, “Ajeh chu ka-Pakai apo mangun hoiya akoiyu kahepoi,” ati.
Chutia ati jou chun akinung heiyin ahile Jesu adin amun, Jesu ahi chu ahepoi.
Jesun ajah a, “Numei ibol’a naka ham? Koiham nahol” a tile; amanun honbol chun angaiton ajah a, “Pu, hikoma kona napohdoh ahile hoiya nakoiyem, seiyin pomang ing kate,” ati.
Jesun ajah a, “Mariam,” ati. Amanu akiheiyin Hebrew paovin ajah a, “Rabboni,” ati; hichu houhil tina ahi.
Jesun ajah a, “Neitong kha hih-in; ijeh-inem itile keima Pa henga chun kakaltou hih laiye; ahin chen lang kasopiho jah a gaseiyin, ka-Pa, nangho Pa, ka-Pathen, nangho Pathen henga kakaltouve,” ati.
Mariam Magdalene chu achen aseijuiho jah a chun, “Pakai chu kamutai,” ati; chule ajah a hiche thu asei jong chu agaseiye.
Chuche hapta kipat ni nilhah chun aseijuite chu Judaho gin a kot kikha khuma um ahiuvin. Jesu ahungin alah uva ahung dingin ajah uva, “Nachunguvah lungmon um hen,” ati.
Aman hiche chu asei jouvin amaho chu akhut le anah avetsah tan ahi. Hiche chun Pakai amu u chu seijuite chu akipah lheh jengun ahi.
Hijeh chun Jesun ajah uva, “Nachunguvah lungmon umhen. Pan keima eisol banga keiman nangho kasol nahiuve,” ati.
Chuin aman hiche chu asei jouvin amaho chu ahu alha khumin, “Lhagao Theng changun;
koi hile achonset nasuh beiyu chu kisubeiya ahi; achonset naumsah-u chu ki-umsah ahi,” ati.
Som le ni lah a khat, Thomas Diduma atiu vang chu Jesu hunga chu amaho lah a um lou ahi.

Hiche chun seijui dang ho chun ajah a, “Keihon Pakai chu kamutauve,” atiuvin ahi. Ahivangin aman ajah uva, “Akhutphang thingkil maha kamua kakhut junga kakhoiya, anah kakhut’a katham lousen tahsan ponge,” ati.
Chuin ni getjou man seijuite insunga a um pettah-un hia chu Thomsa jong ahiuvin, kot kikhah soh keiya ahin, Jesu ahung kit’in alah uva ahung dingin, “Nachunguva lungmon umhen,” ati.
Chutah-in Thomas jah a, “Nakhut jungin hinkhoiyin, kakhut teni hi ven; nakhut hin lhangin lang kanah thamin; chule gingchalel louvin tahsan in,” ati.
Thomas chun adonbut’in ajah a, “KaPakai le ka-Pathen,” ati.
Jesun ajah a, “Neimu jeh a natahsan ahi, mu louva tahsan ho anun nomui,” ati.
Hititah a chu Jesun aseijuite ang sunga melchihna kidang dang tamtah abol ahin, hiti ho chu hiche lekhabu sunga hin akisunpoi;
Jesu chu Pathen Chapa Christa ahi chu natahsan’uva natahsan vanguva ama min a hinna nanei thei dinguva hichengse hi kisuna ahibouve.
Hicheng jou chun Tiberias dil len pang’ah Jesu aseijuite hengah akilah kit leuvin, chule akilah chu hiti hi ahi.
Simon Peter le Thomas Diduma atiu chutoh, Galilee gama Cana khoa mi Nathanael toh, Zebedee chapa teni toh chule seijui dang nitoh um khoma ahiuvin;
Simon Peter in “Keima nga man in chenge,” ati. Amahon ajah a, “Keiho jong lhonu hite,” atiuvin ahi. Chuin acheuvin kong khat’ah alut tauvin, hiche jan chun imacha amanpouvin ahi.
Chuin khovah lhah-in Jesu vaokam’ah adingin, ahivangin seijuiho chun Jesu ahi chu ahepouve.
Hiche chun Jesun ajah uva, “Chate neh ding ima naneiyum?” atile amahon adonbut’un, “Kaneipouve,” atiuve.
Chuin aman ajah uva, “Kongsih jet lama chun len sep leu chun namat dingu ahi,” ati. Hijeh chun amahon aseu le nga atama atam jeh chun akai jouta pouve.
Hiche chun Jesun angailut seijui chun Peter jah a, “Pakai ahi,” ati. Peter in “Pakai ahi,” ati chu ajah phat chun sangkhol aki-ah loiyin, @9(asa goh keova um ahin)@7 dillena chun achomlhan;
seijui dangse vang chu kongneo khat’a akitol’un @9(ijeh-inem itile amaho chu tol’a kona gamla lou ahiuve, tong ja ni toubou kikah ahiuve)@7, nga dimset len akaiyun;
chuti chun tolgo agei phat’un, chukoma chu song meihol meiya kitih le achunga nga kikoi chule changlhah amu’vin ahi.
Jesun ajah uva, “Namatsau nga chu galauvin,” ati.
Hiche chun Simon Peter konga akaldoh-in nga len ja khat le som nga le thum dimset len chu agakaiyin, nga achuti tam vang chun alen chu a-eh pon ahi.
Jesun ajah uva, “Hungun jing an hung neuvin,” ati. Pakai ahi chu aheuvin aseijuiho khatcha jong, “Koi nahim?” tia dong ngama aumpouve.
Jesu ahungin achanglhah chu alan nga jong chu amaho chu apei.
Hiche chu athia kona athodoh nunga aseijuite henga akilah athumveina ahi.
Chuin ajing anneh-u achaiyun, Jesun Simon Peter jah a, “John chapa Simon, nangman hiche ho sanga hi nei ngailutjoh ham?” a tile, aman ajah a,“He-nge. Pakai, ka-ngailut nangin nahenai,” ati.

Aman ajah a, “Kakelngoi nou ho vah-in,” ati. Anivei nan ajah a, “John chapa Simon, nangman neingailut’em?” ati kit tai. Aman ajah a, “Henge, Pakai ka-ngailut nangman nahenai,” ati. Aman ajah a, “Kakelngoi ho chingin,” ati.

Chuin athum vei nan ajah a, “John chapa Simon, nangin neingailut tahbeh mong ham?” ati kit leuvin ahile, thumvei jen, “Neingailut’em?” atijeh chun Peter alung nommotan, ajah a, “Pakai, nangman ijakai nahenai; keiman nangma ka-ngailut nangman nahenai,” ati. Jesun ajah a, “Kakelngoi ho vah-in.

Tahbeh a kaseipeh nahi, nachapan laiya chu natai nakigah a nache na nom noma nacheji ahi; na-upat teng vangle nakhut najah a midangin natai nagah peh ding chule nache nom louna lam lama napui ding ahi,” ati.
Hichu ama iti thia athia Pathen achoiat ding chu hetsahna a ati ahi. Chuin hiche chu asei jouvin ajah a, “Neijuiyin,” ati.
Peter akiheiyin ahile, ajan anneh uva a-anga ki-ngaiya, “Napedoh a pang dinga chu kihom?” tia Jesun angailut seijui chun ajui amui.
Hijeh chun Peter in Jesu jah a, “Pakai, hichepa hi iti ding ham?” ati.
Jesun ajah a, “Kahung kahsen ama hi um hen, tileng hichu ipi ding natim? Nangman keima neijui thimtan,” ati.

Hiche chun hiche asei chu, ‘Hiche seijui chu thi lou ding ahi,’ tin sopite lah a athangtan ahi; ahinla Jesun ama jah a chu, ‘Ama chu thi lou ding ahi,’ ati ahipoi. ‘Kahung kahsen um hen, tileng hichu nangman ipi ding natim?’ ati ahibouve.
Hicheng thu hettohsah a chule hicheng thu suna hi hiche seijui chu ahin; ama thu hettohsah chu tahbeh ahi, ti kaheuve.
Chule hicheng tailouvin jong Jesu thilbol tamtah aume; hiti ho chu abanchan kisun soh kei le kei ngaiton, lekhabu kisun chengse chu vannoi leiset hin dolponte, kati.
